flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n   676\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n   677\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n   678\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n   679\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   680\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   681\u2192\t\t\t\t\t},\n   682\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   683\u2192\t\t\t},\n   684\u2192\t\t},\n   685\u2192\t}, nil)\n   686\u2192\n   687\u2192\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n   688\u2192\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n   689\u2192\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n   690\u2192\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n   691\u2192\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n   692\u2192\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n   693\u2192\t\t},\n   694\u2192\t})\n   695\u2192\n   696\u2192\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n   697\u2192\n   698\u2192\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rollout rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n   699\u2192}\n   700\u2192\n   701\u2192func TestBatch_UnknownFlagType(t *testing.T) {\n   702\u2192\tvar (\n   703\u2192\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n   704\u2192\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n   705\u2192\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n   706\u2192\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n   707\u2192\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n   708\u2192\t)\n   709\u2192\n   710\u2192\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n   711\u2192\n   712\u2192\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n   713\u2192\t\tKey:         flagKey,\n   714\u2192\t\tEnabled:     true,\n   715\u2192\t\tDescription: \"test-flag\",\n   716\u2192\t\tType:        3,\n   717\u2192\t}, nil)\n   718\u2192\n   719\u2192\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n   720\u2192\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n   721\u2192\t\t\t{\n   722\u2192\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n   723\u2192\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n   724\u2192\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n   725\u2192\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n   726\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n   727\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   728\u2192\t\t\t},\n   729\u2192\t\t},\n   730\u2192\t})\n   731\u2192\n   732\u2192\tassert.Error(t, err)\n   733\u2192\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"unknown flag type: 3\")\n   734\u2192}\n   735\u2192\n   736\u2192func TestBatch_InternalError_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n   737\u2192\tvar (\n   738\u2192\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n   739\u2192\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n   740\u2192\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n   741\u2192\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n   742\u2192\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n   743\u2192\t)\n   744\u2192\n   745\u2192\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n   746\u2192\n   747\u2192\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errors.New(\"internal error\"))\n   748\u2192\n   749\u2192\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n   750\u2192\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n   751\u2192\t\t\t{\n   752\u2192\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n   753\u2192\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n   754\u2192\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n   755\u2192\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n   756\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n   757\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   758\u2192\t\t\t},\n   759\u2192\t\t},\n   760\u2192\t})\n   761\u2192\n   762\u2192\tassert.Error(t, err)\n   763\u2192\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"internal error\")\n   764\u2192}\n   765\u2192\n   766\u2192func TestBatch_Success(t *testing.T) {\n   767\u2192\tvar (\n   768\u2192\t\tflagKey        = \"test-flag\"\n   769\u2192\t\tanotherFlagKey = \"another-test-flag\"\n   770\u2192\t\tvariantFlagKey = \"variant-test-flag\"\n   771\u2192\t\tnamespaceKey   = \"test-namespace\"\n   772\u2192\t\tstore          = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n   773\u2192\t\tlogger         = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n   774\u2192\t\ts              = New(logger, store)\n   775\u2192\t)\n   776\u2192\n   777\u2192\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n   778\u2192\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n   779\u2192\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n   780\u2192\t\tEnabled:      true,\n   781\u2192\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n   782\u2192\t}, nil)\n   783\u2192\n   784\u2192\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"another-test-flag\"))\n   785\u2192\n   786\u2192\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n   787\u2192\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n   788\u2192\t\tKey:          \"variant-test-flag\",\n   789\u2192\t\tEnabled:      true,\n   790\u2192\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n   791\u2192\t}, nil)\n   792\u2192\n   793\u2192\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n   794\u2192\t\t{\n   795\u2192\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n   796\u2192\t\t\tRank:         1,\n   797\u2192\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n   798\u2192\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n   799\u2192\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80,\n   800\u2192\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n   801\u2192\t\t\t},\n   802\u2192\t\t},\n   803\u2192\t}, nil)\n   804\u2192\n   805\u2192\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(\n   806\u2192\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n   807\u2192\t\t\t{\n   808\u2192\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n   809\u2192\t\t\t\tFlagKey: variantFlagKey,\n   810\u2192\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n   811\u2192\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n   812\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n   813\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n   814\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n   815\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n   816\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n   817\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n   818\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n   819\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n   820\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n   821\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n   822\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   823\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n   824\u2192\t\t\t\t\t},\n   825\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   826\u2192\t\t\t},\n   827\u2192\t\t}, nil)\n   828\u2192\n   829\u2192\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n   830\u2192\n   831\u2192\tres, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n   832\u2192\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n   833\u2192\t\t\t{\n   834\u2192\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"1\",\n   835\u2192\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n   836\u2192\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n   837\u2192\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n   838\u2192\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n   839\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n   840\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   841\u2192\t\t\t},\n   842\u2192\t\t\t{\n   843\u2192\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"2\",\n   844\u2192\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      anotherFlagKey,\n   845\u2192\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n   846\u2192\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n   847\u2192\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n   848\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n   849\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   850\u2192\t\t\t},\n   851\u2192\t\t\t{\n   852\u2192\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"3\",\n   853\u2192\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variantFlagKey,\n   854\u2192\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n   855\u2192\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n   856\u2192\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n   857\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n   858\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   859\u2192\t\t\t},\n   860\u2192\t\t},\n   861\u2192\t})\n   862\u2192\n   863\u2192\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n   864\u2192\n   865\u2192\tassert.Len(t, res.Responses, 3)\n   866\u2192\n   867\u2192\tb, ok := res.Responses[0].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse)\n   868\u2192\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a boolean evaluation response\")\n   869\u2192\tassert.True(t, b.BooleanResponse.Enabled, \"value should be true from match\")\n   870\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, b.BooleanResponse.Reason)\n   871\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[0].Type)\n   872\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, \"1\", b.BooleanResponse.RequestId)\n   873\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, b.BooleanResponse.FlagKey)\n   874\u2192\n   875\u2192\te, ok := res.Responses[1].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse)\n   876\u2192\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a error evaluation response\")\n   877\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, anotherFlagKey, e.ErrorResponse.FlagKey)\n   878\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, namespaceKey, e.ErrorResponse.NamespaceKey)\n   879\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, e.ErrorResponse.Reason)\n   880\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[1].Type)\n   881\u2192\n   882\u2192\tv, ok := res.Responses[2].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse)\n   883\u2192\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a variant evaluation response\")\n   884\u2192\tassert.True(t, v.VariantResponse.Match, \"variant response should have matched\")\n   885\u2192\tassert.Contains(t, v.VariantResponse.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n   886\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, v.VariantResponse.Reason)\n   887\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[2].Type)\n   888\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, \"3\", v.VariantResponse.RequestId)\n   889\u2192\tassert.Equal(t, variantFlagKey, v.VariantResponse.FlagKey)\n   890\u2192}\n   891\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
15. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go"
}
Output
"     1\u2192package evaluation\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192import (\n     4\u2192\t\"context\"\n     5\u2192\t\"encoding/json\"\n     6\u2192\t\"fmt\"\n     7\u2192\t\"hash/crc32\"\n     8\u2192\t\"slices\"\n     9\u2192\t\"sort\"\n    10\u2192\t\"strconv\"\n    11\u2192\t\"strings\"\n    12\u2192\t\"time\"\n    13\u2192\n    14\u2192\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n    15\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n    16\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n    17\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n    18\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n    19\u2192\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n    20\u2192\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n    21\u2192\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n    22\u2192)\n    23\u2192\n    24\u2192// Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\n    25\u2192type Evaluator struct {\n    26\u2192\tlogger *zap.Logger\n    27\u2192\tstore  Storer\n    28\u2192}\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\n    31\u2192func NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n    32\u2192\treturn &Evaluator{\n    33\u2192\t\tlogger: logger,\n    34\u2192\t\tstore:  store,\n    35\u2192\t}\n    36\u2192}\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192func (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n    39\u2192\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n    40\u2192\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n    41\u2192\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n    42\u2192\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n    43\u2192\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n    44\u2192\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n    45\u2192\t}\n    46\u2192\n    47\u2192\tvar (\n    48\u2192\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n    49\u2192\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n    50\u2192\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n    51\u2192\t)\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192\tdefer func() {\n    56\u2192\t\tif err == nil {\n    57\u2192\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n    58\u2192\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n    59\u2192\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n    60\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n    61\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n    62\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n    63\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n    64\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n    65\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n    66\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"variant\"),\n    67\u2192\t\t\t\t\t),\n    68\u2192\t\t\t\t),\n    69\u2192\t\t\t)\n    70\u2192\t\t} else {\n    71\u2192\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n    72\u2192\t\t}\n    73\u2192\n    74\u2192\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n    75\u2192\t\t\tctx,\n    76\u2192\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n    77\u2192\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n    78\u2192\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n    79\u2192\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n    80\u2192\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n    81\u2192\t\t\t\t),\n    82\u2192\t\t\t),\n    83\u2192\t\t)\n    84\u2192\t}()\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n    87\u2192\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n    88\u2192\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n    89\u2192\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n    90\u2192\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n    91\u2192\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n    92\u2192\t}\n    93\u2192\n    94\u2192\tif !flag.Enabled {\n    95\u2192\t\tresp.Match = false\n    96\u2192\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n    97\u2192\t\treturn resp, nil\n    98\u2192\t}\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n   101\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   102\u2192\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n   103\u2192\t\treturn resp, err\n   104\u2192\t}\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n   107\u2192\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n   108\u2192\t\treturn resp, nil\n   109\u2192\t}\n   110\u2192\n   111\u2192\tvar lastRank int32\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192\t// rule loop\n   114\u2192\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n   115\u2192\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n   116\u2192\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n   117\u2192\t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n   118\u2192\t\t}\n   119\u2192\n   120\u2192\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192\t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n   123\u2192\t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192\t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n   126\u2192\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n   127\u2192\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   128\u2192\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n   129\u2192\t\t\t\treturn resp, err\n   130\u2192\t\t\t}\n   131\u2192\n   132\u2192\t\t\tif matched {\n   133\u2192\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(reason)\n   134\u2192\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n   135\u2192\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n   136\u2192\t\t\t}\n   137\u2192\t\t}\n   138\u2192\n   139\u2192\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n   140\u2192\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n   141\u2192\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n   142\u2192\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\tcontinue\n   144\u2192\t\t\t}\n   145\u2192\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n   146\u2192\t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\tcontinue\n   149\u2192\t\t\t}\n   150\u2192\t\t}\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192\t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n   153\u2192\t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n   154\u2192\t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n   155\u2192\t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n   156\u2192\t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n   157\u2192\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n   158\u2192\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n   159\u2192\t\t}\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192\t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n   162\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   163\u2192\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n   164\u2192\t\t\treturn resp, err\n   165\u2192\t\t}\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192\t\tvar (\n   168\u2192\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n   169\u2192\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n   170\u2192\t\t)\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n   173\u2192\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n   174\u2192\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n   176\u2192\n   177\u2192\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n   178\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n   179\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n   180\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   181\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n   182\u2192\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n   183\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   184\u2192\t\t\t}\n   185\u2192\t\t}\n   186\u2192\n   187\u2192\t\t// no distributions for rule\n   188\u2192\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n   189\u2192\t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n   190\u2192\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n   191\u2192\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n   192\u2192\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n   193\u2192\t\t}\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192\t\tvar (\n   196\u2192\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n   197\u2192\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n   198\u2192\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n   199\u2192\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n   200\u2192\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n   201\u2192\t\t)\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n   204\u2192\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n   205\u2192\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n   206\u2192\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n   207\u2192\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n   208\u2192\t\t}\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n   211\u2192\t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192\t\tresp.Match = true\n   214\u2192\t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n   215\u2192\t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n   216\u2192\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n   217\u2192\t\treturn resp, nil\n   218\u2192\t} // end rule loop\n   219\u2192\n   220\u2192\treturn resp, nil\n   221\u2192}\n   222\u2192\n   223\u2192// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n   224\u2192// on the match type.\n   225\u2192func (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n   226\u2192\tconstraintMatches := 0\n   227\u2192\n   228\u2192\tvar reason string\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n   231\u2192\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n   232\u2192\n   233\u2192\t\tvar (\n   234\u2192\t\t\tmatch bool\n   235\u2192\t\t\terr   error\n   236\u2192\t\t)\n   237\u2192\n   238\u2192\t\tswitch c.Type {\n   239\u2192\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n   240\u2192\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n   241\u2192\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n   242\u2192\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n   243\u2192\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n   244\u2192\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n   245\u2192\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n   246\u2192\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n   247\u2192\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n   248\u2192\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n   249\u2192\t\tdefault:\n   250\u2192\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n   251\u2192\t\t}\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   254\u2192\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n   255\u2192\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n   256\u2192\t\t}\n   257\u2192\n   258\u2192\t\tif match {\n   259\u2192\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n   260\u2192\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n   263\u2192\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n   264\u2192\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n   265\u2192\t\t\t\tbreak\n   266\u2192\t\t\tdefault:\n   267\u2192\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n   268\u2192\t\t\t\tcontinue\n   269\u2192\t\t\t}\n   270\u2192\t\t} else {\n   271\u2192\t\t\t// no match\n   272\u2192\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n   273\u2192\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n   274\u2192\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n   275\u2192\t\t\t\tbreak\n   276\u2192\t\t\tdefault:\n   277\u2192\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n   278\u2192\t\t\t\tcontinue\n   279\u2192\t\t\t}\n   280\u2192\t\t}\n   281\u2192\t}\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192\tvar matched = true\n   284\u2192\n   285\u2192\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n   286\u2192\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n   287\u2192\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n   288\u2192\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n   289\u2192\t\t\tmatched = false\n   290\u2192\t\t}\n   291\u2192\n   292\u2192\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n   293\u2192\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n   294\u2192\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n   295\u2192\t\t\tmatched = false\n   296\u2192\t\t}\n   297\u2192\tdefault:\n   298\u2192\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n   299\u2192\t\tmatched = false\n   300\u2192\t}\n   301\u2192\n   302\u2192\treturn matched, reason, nil\n   303\u2192}\n   304\u2192\n   305\u2192func crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n   306\u2192\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n   307\u2192}\n   308\u2192\n   309\u2192const (\n   310\u2192\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n   311\u2192\t// distribution and rollout\n   312\u2192\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n   315\u2192\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n   316\u2192)\n   317\u2192\n   318\u2192func matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n   319\u2192\tswitch c.Operator {\n   320\u2192\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n   321\u2192\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n   322\u2192\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n   323\u2192\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n   324\u2192\t}\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192\tif v == \"\" {\n   327\u2192\t\treturn false\n   328\u2192\t}\n   329\u2192\n   330\u2192\tvalue := c.Value\n   331\u2192\n   332\u2192\tswitch c.Operator {\n   333\u2192\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n   334\u2192\t\treturn value == v\n   335\u2192\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n   336\u2192\t\treturn value != v\n   337\u2192\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n   338\u2192\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n   339\u2192\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n   340\u2192\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n   341\u2192\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n   342\u2192\t\tvalues := []string{}\n   343\u2192\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n   344\u2192\t\t\treturn false\n   345\u2192\t\t}\n   346\u2192\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n   347\u2192\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n   348\u2192\t\tvalues := []string{}\n   349\u2192\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n   350\u2192\t\t\treturn false\n   351\u2192\t\t}\n   352\u2192\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n   353\u2192\t}\n   354\u2192\n   355\u2192\treturn false\n   356\u2192}\n   357\u2192\n   358\u2192func matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n   359\u2192\tswitch c.Operator {\n   360\u2192\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n   361\u2192\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n   362\u2192\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n   363\u2192\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n   364\u2192\t}\n   365\u2192\n   366\u2192\t// can't parse an empty string\n   367\u2192\tif v == \"\" {\n   368\u2192\t\treturn false, nil\n   369\u2192\t}\n   370\u2192\n   371\u2192\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n   372\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   373\u2192\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n   374\u2192\t}\n   375\u2192\n   376\u2192\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n   377\u2192\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n   378\u2192\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n   379\u2192\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n   380\u2192\t\t}\n   381\u2192\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n   382\u2192\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n   383\u2192\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n   384\u2192\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n   385\u2192\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n   386\u2192\t\t}\n   387\u2192\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n   388\u2192\t}\n   389\u2192\n   390\u2192\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n   391\u2192\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n   392\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   393\u2192\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n   394\u2192\t}\n   395\u2192\n   396\u2192\tswitch c.Operator {\n   397\u2192\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n   398\u2192\t\treturn value == n, nil\n   399\u2192\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n   400\u2192\t\treturn value != n, nil\n   401\u2192\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n   402\u2192\t\treturn n < value, nil\n   403\u2192\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n   404\u2192\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n   405\u2192\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n   406\u2192\t\treturn n > value, nil\n   407\u2192\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n   408\u2192\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n   409\u2192\t}\n   410\u2192\n   411\u2192\treturn false, nil\n   412\u2192}\n   413\u2192\n   414\u2192func matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n   415\u2192\tswitch c.Operator {\n   416\u2192\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n   417\u2192\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n   418\u2192\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n   419\u2192\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n   420\u2192\t}\n   421\u2192\n   422\u2192\t// can't parse an empty string\n   423\u2192\tif v == \"\" {\n   424\u2192\t\treturn false, nil\n   425\u2192\t}\n   426\u2192\n   427\u2192\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n   428\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   429\u2192\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n   430\u2192\t}\n   431\u2192\n   432\u2192\tswitch c.Operator {\n   433\u2192\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n   434\u2192\t\treturn value, nil\n   435\u2192\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n   436\u2192\t\treturn !value, nil\n   437\u2192\t}\n   438\u2192\n   439\u2192\treturn false, nil\n   440\u2192}\n   441\u2192\n   442\u2192func matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n   443\u2192\tswitch c.Operator {\n   444\u2192\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n   445\u2192\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n   446\u2192\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n   447\u2192\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n   448\u2192\t}\n   449\u2192\n   450\u2192\t// can't parse an empty string\n   451\u2192\tif v == \"\" {\n   452\u2192\t\treturn false, nil\n   453\u2192\t}\n   454\u2192\n   455\u2192\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n   456\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   457\u2192\t\treturn false, err\n   458\u2192\t}\n   459\u2192\n   460\u2192\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n   461\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   462\u2192\t\treturn false, err\n   463\u2192\t}\n   464\u2192\n   465\u2192\tswitch c.Operator {\n   466\u2192\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n   467\u2192\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n   468\u2192\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n   469\u2192\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n   470\u2192\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n   471\u2192\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n   472\u2192\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n   473\u2192\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n   474\u2192\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n   475\u2192\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n   476\u2192\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n   477\u2192\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n   478\u2192\t}\n   479\u2192\n   480\u2192\treturn false, nil\n   481\u2192}\n   482\u2192\n   483\u2192func tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n   484\u2192\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n   485\u2192\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n   486\u2192\t}\n   487\u2192\n   488\u2192\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n   489\u2192\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n   490\u2192\t}\n   491\u2192\n   492\u2192\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n   493\u2192}\n   494\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"     1\u2192package server\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192import (\n     4\u2192\t\"context\"\n     5\u2192\t\"errors\"\n     6\u2192\n     7\u2192\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n     8\u2192\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n     9\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n    10\u2192\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n    11\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n    12\u2192\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n    13\u2192\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n    14\u2192\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n    15\u2192)\n    16\u2192\n    17\u2192// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\n    18\u2192func (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n    19\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n    22\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    23\u2192\t\tvar resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n    24\u2192\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n    25\u2192\n    26\u2192\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n    27\u2192\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n    28\u2192\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_NOT_FOUND_EVALUATION_REASON\n    29\u2192\t\t}\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192\t\treturn resp, err\n    32\u2192\t}\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n    35\u2192\t\tRequestId:    r.RequestId,\n    36\u2192\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n    37\u2192\t\tEntityId:     r.EntityId,\n    38\u2192\t\tContext:      r.Context,\n    39\u2192\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n    40\u2192\t})\n    41\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    42\u2192\t\treturn resp, err\n    43\u2192\t}\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n    46\u2192\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n    47\u2192\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n    48\u2192\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n    49\u2192\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n    50\u2192\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n    51\u2192\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n    52\u2192\t}\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192\tif resp != nil {\n    55\u2192\t\tspanAttrs = append(spanAttrs,\n    56\u2192\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n    57\u2192\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n    58\u2192\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n    59\u2192\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n    60\u2192\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.Value),\n    61\u2192\t\t)\n    62\u2192\t}\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192\t// add otel attributes to span\n    65\u2192\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n    66\u2192\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n    69\u2192\treturn resp, nil\n    70\u2192}\n    71\u2192\n    72\u2192// BatchEvaluate evaluates a request for multiple flags and entities\n    73\u2192func (s *Server) BatchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n    74\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n    77\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = flipt.DefaultNamespace\n    78\u2192\t}\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192\tresp, err := s.batchEvaluate(ctx, r)\n    81\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    82\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    83\u2192\t}\n    84\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n    85\u2192\treturn resp, nil\n    86\u2192}\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192func (s *Server) batchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n    89\u2192\tres := flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n    90\u2192\t\tResponses: make([]*flipt.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(r.GetRequests())),\n    91\u2192\t}\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192\t// TODO: we should change this to a native batch query instead of looping through\n    94\u2192\t// each request individually\n    95\u2192\tfor _, req := range r.GetRequests() {\n    96\u2192\t\t// ensure all requests have the same namespace\n    97\u2192\t\tif req.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n    98\u2192\t\t\treq.NamespaceKey = r.NamespaceKey\n    99\u2192\t\t} else if req.NamespaceKey != r.NamespaceKey {\n   100\u2192\t\t\treturn &res, errs.InvalidFieldError(\"namespace_key\", \"must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n   101\u2192\t\t}\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192\t\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey))\n   104\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   105\u2192\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n   106\u2192\t\t\tif r.GetExcludeNotFound() && errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n   107\u2192\t\t\t\tcontinue\n   108\u2192\t\t\t}\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192\t\t\treturn &res, err\n   111\u2192\t\t}\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192\t\t// TODO: we also need to validate each request, we should likely do this in the validation middleware\n   114\u2192\t\tf, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n   115\u2192\t\t\tRequestId:    req.RequestId,\n   116\u2192\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n   117\u2192\t\t\tEntityId:     req.EntityId,\n   118\u2192\t\t\tContext:      req.Context,\n   119\u2192\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n   120\u2192\t\t})\n   121\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   122\u2192\t\t\ts.logger.Error(\"error evaluating flag\", zap.Error(err))\n   123\u2192\t\t\treturn &res, err\n   124\u2192\t\t}\n   125\u2192\n   126\u2192\t\tf.RequestId = \"\"\n   127\u2192\t\tres.Responses = append(res.Responses, f)\n   128\u2192\t}\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192\treturn &res, nil\n   131\u2192}\n   132\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n     8\u2192\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n     9\u2192\tempty \"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/emptypb\"\n    10\u2192)\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192// GetSegment gets a segment\n    13\u2192func (s *Server) GetSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.GetSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n    14\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"get segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    15\u2192\tsegment, err := s.store.GetSegment(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n    16\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"get segment\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", segment))\n    17\u2192\treturn segment, err\n    18\u2192}\n    19\u2192\n    20\u2192// ListSegments lists all segments\n    21\u2192func (s *Server) ListSegments(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.ListSegmentRequest) (*flipt.SegmentList, error) {\n    22\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"list segments\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    23\u2192\n    24\u2192\tns := storage.NewNamespace(r.NamespaceKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference))\n    25\u2192\tresults, err := s.store.ListSegments(ctx, storage.ListWithParameters(ns, r))\n    26\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    27\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    28\u2192\t}\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192\tresp := flipt.SegmentList{\n    31\u2192\t\tSegments: results.Results,\n    32\u2192\t}\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192\ttotal, err := s.store.CountSegments(ctx, ns)\n    35\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    36\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    37\u2192\t}\n    38\u2192\n    39\u2192\tresp.TotalCount = int32(total)\n    40\u2192\tresp.NextPageToken = results.NextPageToken\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"list segments\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", &resp))\n    43\u2192\treturn &resp, nil\n    44\u2192}\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192// CreateSegment creates a segment\n    47\u2192func (s *Server) CreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n    48\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"create segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    49\u2192\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(ctx, r)\n    50\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"create segment\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", segment))\n    51\u2192\treturn segment, err\n    52\u2192}\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192// UpdateSegment updates an existing segment\n    55\u2192func (s *Server) UpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n    56\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"update segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    57\u2192\tsegment, err := s.store.UpdateSegment(ctx, r)\n    58\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"update segment\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", segment))\n    59\u2192\treturn segment, err\n    60\u2192}\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192// DeleteSegment deletes a segment\n    63\u2192func (s *Server) DeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n    64\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"delete segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    65\u2192\tif err := s.store.DeleteSegment(ctx, r); err != nil {\n    66\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    67\u2192\t}\n    68\u2192\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n    69\u2192}\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192// CreateConstraint creates a constraint\n    72\u2192func (s *Server) CreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n    73\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"create constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    74\u2192\tconstraint, err := s.store.CreateConstraint(ctx, r)\n    75\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"create constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", constraint))\n    76\u2192\treturn constraint, err\n    77\u2192}\n    78\u2192\n    79\u2192// UpdateConstraint updates an existing constraint\n    80\u2192func (s *Server) UpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n    81\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"update constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    82\u2192\tconstraint, err := s.store.UpdateConstraint(ctx, r)\n    83\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"update constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", constraint))\n    84\u2192\treturn constraint, err\n    85\u2192}\n    86\u2192\n    87\u2192// DeleteConstraint deletes a constraint\n    88\u2192func (s *Server) DeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n    89\u2192\ts.logger.Debug(\"delete constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n    90\u2192\tif err := s.store.DeleteConstraint(ctx, r); err != nil {\n    91\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    92\u2192\t}\n    93\u2192\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n    94\u2192}\n    95\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"     1\u2192package common\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192import (\n     4\u2192\t\"bytes\"\n     5\u2192\t\"context\"\n     6\u2192\t\"database/sql\"\n     7\u2192\t\"encoding/base64\"\n     8\u2192\t\"encoding/json\"\n     9\u2192\t\"errors\"\n    10\u2192\t\"fmt\"\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192\tsq \"github.com/Masterminds/squirrel\"\n    13\u2192\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n    14\u2192\n    15\u2192\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n    16\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n    17\u2192\tfliptsql \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n    18\u2192\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n    19\u2192)\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192func compactJSONString(jsonString string) (string, error) {\n    22\u2192\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n    23\u2192\tif err := json.Compact(&buf, []byte(jsonString)); err != nil {\n    24\u2192\t\treturn \"\", err\n    25\u2192\t}\n    26\u2192\treturn buf.String(), nil\n    27\u2192}\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192func emptyAsNil(str string) *string {\n    30\u2192\tif str == \"\" {\n    31\u2192\t\treturn nil\n    32\u2192\t}\n    33\u2192\treturn &str\n    34\u2192}\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192// GetFlag gets a flag with variants by key\n    37\u2192func (s *Store) GetFlag(ctx context.Context, p storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n    38\u2192\tvar (\n    39\u2192\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n    40\u2192\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n    43\u2192\n    44\u2192\t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n    45\u2192\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n    46\u2192\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": p.Key}).\n    47\u2192\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n    48\u2192\t\t\tScan(\n    49\u2192\t\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n    50\u2192\t\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n    51\u2192\t\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n    52\u2192\t\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n    53\u2192\t\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n    54\u2192\t\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n    55\u2192\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n    56\u2192\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n    57\u2192\t)\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    60\u2192\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n    61\u2192\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n    62\u2192\t\t}\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    65\u2192\t}\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\tflag.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n    68\u2192\tflag.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, flag_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n    71\u2192\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n    72\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": flag.NamespaceKey, \"flag_key\": flag.Key}).\n    73\u2192\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n    76\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    77\u2192\t\treturn flag, err\n    78\u2192\t}\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192\tdefer func() {\n    81\u2192\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n    82\u2192\t\t\terr = cerr\n    83\u2192\t\t}\n    84\u2192\t}()\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192\tfor rows.Next() {\n    87\u2192\t\tvar (\n    88\u2192\t\t\tvariant              flipt.Variant\n    89\u2192\t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n    90\u2192\t\t\tattachment           sql.NullString\n    91\u2192\t\t)\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n    94\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Id,\n    95\u2192\t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n    96\u2192\t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n    97\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Key,\n    98\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Name,\n    99\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Description,\n   100\u2192\t\t\t&attachment,\n   101\u2192\t\t\t&createdAt,\n   102\u2192\t\t\t&updatedAt); err != nil {\n   103\u2192\t\t\treturn flag, err\n   104\u2192\t\t}\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192\t\tvariant.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n   107\u2192\t\tvariant.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n   108\u2192\t\tif attachment.Valid {\n   109\u2192\t\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(attachment.String)\n   110\u2192\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   111\u2192\t\t\t\treturn flag, err\n   112\u2192\t\t\t}\n   113\u2192\t\t\tvariant.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n   114\u2192\t\t}\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192\t\tflag.Variants = append(flag.Variants, &variant)\n   117\u2192\t}\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192\treturn flag, rows.Err()\n   120\u2192}\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192type optionalVariant struct {\n   123\u2192\tId           sql.NullString\n   124\u2192\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n   125\u2192\tKey          sql.NullString\n   126\u2192\tFlagKey      sql.NullString\n   127\u2192\tName         sql.NullString\n   128\u2192\tDescription  sql.NullString\n   129\u2192\tAttachment   sql.NullString\n   130\u2192\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n   131\u2192\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n   132\u2192}\n   133\u2192\n   134\u2192// ListFlags lists all flags with variants\n   135\u2192func (s *Store) ListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error) {\n   136\u2192\tvar (\n   137\u2192\t\tflags   []*flipt.Flag\n   138\u2192\t\tresults = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{}\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n   141\u2192\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n   142\u2192\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n   143\u2192\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n   144\u2192\t)\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192\tif req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n   147\u2192\t\tquery = query.Limit(req.QueryParams.Limit + 1)\n   148\u2192\t}\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192\tvar offset uint64\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192\tif req.QueryParams.PageToken != \"\" {\n   153\u2192\t\ttoken, err := decodePageToken(s.logger, req.QueryParams.PageToken)\n   154\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   155\u2192\t\t\treturn results, err\n   156\u2192\t\t}\n   157\u2192\n   158\u2192\t\toffset = token.Offset\n   159\u2192\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n   160\u2192\t} else if req.QueryParams.Offset > 0 {\n   161\u2192\t\toffset = req.QueryParams.Offset\n   162\u2192\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n   163\u2192\t}\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n   166\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   167\u2192\t\treturn results, err\n   168\u2192\t}\n   169\u2192\n   170\u2192\tdefer func() {\n   171\u2192\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n   172\u2192\t\t\terr = cerr\n   173\u2192\t\t}\n   174\u2192\t}()\n   175\u2192\n   176\u2192\t// keep track of flags so we can associated variants in second query.\n   177\u2192\tflagsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Flag)\n   178\u2192\tfor rows.Next() {\n   179\u2192\t\tvar (\n   180\u2192\t\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192\t\t\tfCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n   183\u2192\t\t\tfUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n   184\u2192\t\t)\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n   187\u2192\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n   188\u2192\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n   189\u2192\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n   190\u2192\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n   191\u2192\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n   192\u2192\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n   193\u2192\t\t\t&fCreatedAt,\n   194\u2192\t\t\t&fUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n   195\u2192\t\t\treturn results, err\n   196\u2192\t\t}\n   197\u2192\n   198\u2192\t\tflag.CreatedAt = fCreatedAt.Timestamp\n   199\u2192\t\tflag.UpdatedAt = fUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n   200\u2192\n   201\u2192\t\tflags = append(flags, flag)\n   202\u2192\t\tflagsByKey[flag.Key] = flag\n   203\u2192\t}\n   204\u2192\n   205\u2192\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n   206\u2192\t\treturn results, err\n   207\u2192\t}\n   208\u2192\n   209\u2192\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n   210\u2192\t\treturn results, err\n   211\u2192\t}\n   212\u2192\n   213\u2192\tif err := s.setVariants(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), flagsByKey); err != nil {\n   214\u2192\t\treturn results, err\n   215\u2192\t}\n   216\u2192\n   217\u2192\tvar next *flipt.Flag\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192\tif len(flags) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n   220\u2192\t\tnext = flags[len(flags)-1]\n   221\u2192\t\tflags = flags[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n   222\u2192\t}\n   223\u2192\n   224\u2192\tresults.Results = flags\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192\tif next != nil {\n   227\u2192\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(flags))})\n   228\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   229\u2192\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n   230\u2192\t\t}\n   231\u2192\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n   232\u2192\t}\n   233\u2192\n   234\u2192\treturn results, nil\n   235\u2192}\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192func (s *Store) setVariants(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, flagsByKey map[string]*flipt.Flag) error {\n   238\u2192\tallFlagKeys := make([]string, 0, len(flagsByKey))\n   239\u2192\tfor k := range flagsByKey {\n   240\u2192\t\tallFlagKeys = append(allFlagKeys, k)\n   241\u2192\t}\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n   244\u2192\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n   245\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": namespaceKey, \"flag_key\": allFlagKeys}).\n   246\u2192\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at\")\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n   249\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   250\u2192\t\treturn err\n   251\u2192\t}\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192\tdefer func() {\n   254\u2192\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n   255\u2192\t\t\terr = cerr\n   256\u2192\t\t}\n   257\u2192\t}()\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192\tfor rows.Next() {\n   260\u2192\t\tvar (\n   261\u2192\t\t\tvariant    optionalVariant\n   262\u2192\t\t\tvCreatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n   263\u2192\t\t\tvUpdatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n   264\u2192\t\t)\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n   267\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Id,\n   268\u2192\t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n   269\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Key,\n   270\u2192\t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n   271\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Name,\n   272\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Description,\n   273\u2192\t\t\t&variant.Attachment,\n   274\u2192\t\t\t&vCreatedAt,\n   275\u2192\t\t\t&vUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n   276\u2192\t\t\treturn err\n   277\u2192\t\t}\n   278\u2192\n   279\u2192\t\tif flag, ok := flagsByKey[variant.FlagKey.String]; ok {\n   280\u2192\t\t\tflag.Variants = append(flag.Variants, &flipt.Variant{\n   281\u2192\t\t\t\tId:           variant.Id.String,\n   282\u2192\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: variant.NamespaceKey.String,\n   283\u2192\t\t\t\tKey:          variant.Key.String,\n   284\u2192\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variant.FlagKey.String,\n   285\u2192\t\t\t\tName:         variant.Name.String,\n   286\u2192\t\t\t\tDescription:  variant.Description.String,\n   287\u2192\t\t\t\tAttachment:   variant.Attachment.String,\n   288\u2192\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:    vCreatedAt.Timestamp,\n   289\u2192\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    vUpdatedAt.Timestamp,\n   290\u2192\t\t\t})\n   291\u2192\t\t}\n   292\u2192\t}\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n   295\u2192\t\treturn err\n   296\u2192\t}\n   297\u2192\n   298\u2192\treturn rows.Close()\n   299\u2192}\n   300\u2192\n   301\u2192// CountFlags counts all flags\n   302\u2192func (s *Store) CountFlags(ctx context.Context, p storage.NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error) {\n   303\u2192\tvar count uint64\n   304\u2192\n   305\u2192\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"COUNT(*)\").\n   306\u2192\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n   307\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace()}).\n   308\u2192\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n   309\u2192\t\tScan(&count); err != nil {\n   310\u2192\t\treturn 0, err\n   311\u2192\t}\n   312\u2192\n   313\u2192\treturn count, nil\n   314\u2192}\n   315\u2192\n   316\u2192// CreateFlag creates a flag\n   317\u2192func (s *Store) CreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n   318\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   319\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   320\u2192\t}\n   321\u2192\n   322\u2192\tvar (\n   323\u2192\t\tnow  = flipt.Now()\n   324\u2192\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{\n   325\u2192\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n   326\u2192\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n   327\u2192\t\t\tType:         r.Type,\n   328\u2192\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n   329\u2192\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n   330\u2192\t\t\tEnabled:      r.Enabled,\n   331\u2192\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n   332\u2192\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n   333\u2192\t\t}\n   334\u2192\t)\n   335\u2192\n   336\u2192\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"flags\").\n   337\u2192\t\tColumns(\"namespace_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"\\\"type\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"enabled\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n   338\u2192\t\tValues(\n   339\u2192\t\t\tflag.NamespaceKey,\n   340\u2192\t\t\tflag.Key,\n   341\u2192\t\t\tflag.Type,\n   342\u2192\t\t\tflag.Name,\n   343\u2192\t\t\tflag.Description,\n   344\u2192\t\t\tflag.Enabled,\n   345\u2192\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flag.CreatedAt},\n   346\u2192\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flag.UpdatedAt},\n   347\u2192\t\t).\n   348\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n   349\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   350\u2192\t}\n   351\u2192\n   352\u2192\treturn flag, nil\n   353\u2192}\n   354\u2192\n   355\u2192// UpdateFlag updates an existing flag\n   356\u2192func (s *Store) UpdateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n   357\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   358\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   359\u2192\t}\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"flags\").\n   362\u2192\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n   363\u2192\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n   364\u2192\t\tSet(\"enabled\", r.Enabled).\n   365\u2192\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n   366\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}})\n   367\u2192\n   368\u2192\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n   369\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   370\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   371\u2192\t}\n   372\u2192\n   373\u2192\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n   374\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   375\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   376\u2192\t}\n   377\u2192\n   378\u2192\tp := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key)\n   379\u2192\n   380\u2192\tif count != 1 {\n   381\u2192\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n   382\u2192\t}\n   383\u2192\n   384\u2192\treturn s.GetFlag(ctx, p)\n   385\u2192}\n   386\u2192\n   387\u2192// DeleteFlag deletes a flag\n   388\u2192func (s *Store) DeleteFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteFlagRequest) error {\n   389\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   390\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   391\u2192\t}\n   392\u2192\n   393\u2192\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"flags\").\n   394\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}}).\n   395\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n   396\u2192\n   397\u2192\treturn err\n   398\u2192}\n   399\u2192\n   400\u2192// CreateVariant creates a variant\n   401\u2192func (s *Store) CreateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n   402\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   403\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   404\u2192\t}\n   405\u2192\n   406\u2192\tvar (\n   407\u2192\t\tnow = flipt.Now()\n   408\u2192\t\tv   = &flipt.Variant{\n   409\u2192\t\t\tId:           uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n   410\u2192\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n   411\u2192\t\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n   412\u2192\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n   413\u2192\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n   414\u2192\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n   415\u2192\t\t\tAttachment:   r.Attachment,\n   416\u2192\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n   417\u2192\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n   418\u2192\t\t}\n   419\u2192\t)\n   420\u2192\n   421\u2192\tattachment := emptyAsNil(r.Attachment)\n   422\u2192\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"variants\").\n   423\u2192\t\tColumns(\"id\", \"namespace_key\", \"flag_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"attachment\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n   424\u2192\t\tValues(\n   425\u2192\t\t\tv.Id,\n   426\u2192\t\t\tv.NamespaceKey,\n   427\u2192\t\t\tv.FlagKey,\n   428\u2192\t\t\tv.Key,\n   429\u2192\t\t\tv.Name,\n   430\u2192\t\t\tv.Description,\n   431\u2192\t\t\tattachment,\n   432\u2192\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: v.CreatedAt},\n   433\u2192\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: v.UpdatedAt},\n   434\u2192\t\t).\n   435\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n   436\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   437\u2192\t}\n   438\u2192\n   439\u2192\tif attachment != nil {\n   440\u2192\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(*attachment)\n   441\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   442\u2192\t\t\treturn nil, err\n   443\u2192\t\t}\n   444\u2192\t\tv.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n   445\u2192\t}\n   446\u2192\n   447\u2192\treturn v, nil\n   448\u2192}\n   449\u2192\n   450\u2192// UpdateVariant updates an existing variant\n   451\u2192func (s *Store) UpdateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n   452\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   453\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   454\u2192\t}\n   455\u2192\n   456\u2192\twhereClause := sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"flag_key\": r.FlagKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}\n   457\u2192\n   458\u2192\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"variants\").\n   459\u2192\t\tSet(\"\\\"key\\\"\", r.Key).\n   460\u2192\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n   461\u2192\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n   462\u2192\t\tSet(\"attachment\", emptyAsNil(r.Attachment)).\n   463\u2192\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n   464\u2192\t\tWhere(whereClause)\n   465\u2192\n   466\u2192\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n   467\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   468\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   469\u2192\t}\n   470\u2192\n   471\u2192\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n   472\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   473\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   474\u2192\t}\n   475\u2192\n   476\u2192\tif count != 1 {\n   477\u2192\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"variant %q\", r.Key)\n   478\u2192\t}\n   479\u2192\n   480\u2192\tvar (\n   481\u2192\t\tattachment sql.NullString\n   482\u2192\t\tcreatedAt  fliptsql.Timestamp\n   483\u2192\t\tupdatedAt  fliptsql.Timestamp\n   484\u2192\n   485\u2192\t\tv = &flipt.Variant{}\n   486\u2192\t)\n   487\u2192\n   488\u2192\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n   489\u2192\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n   490\u2192\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n   491\u2192\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n   492\u2192\t\tScan(&v.Id, &v.NamespaceKey, &v.Key, &v.FlagKey, &v.Name, &v.Description, &attachment, &createdAt, &updatedAt); err != nil {\n   493\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   494\u2192\t}\n   495\u2192\n   496\u2192\tv.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n   497\u2192\tv.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n   498\u2192\tif attachment.Valid {\n   499\u2192\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(attachment.String)\n   500\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   501\u2192\t\t\treturn nil, err\n   502\u2192\t\t}\n   503\u2192\t\tv.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n   504\u2192\t}\n   505\u2192\n   506\u2192\treturn v, nil\n   507\u2192}\n   508\u2192\n   509\u2192// DeleteVariant deletes a variant\n   510\u2192func (s *Store) DeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) error {\n   511\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   512\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   513\u2192\t}\n   514\u2192\n   515\u2192\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"variants\").\n   516\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"flag_key\": r.FlagKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}).\n   517\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n   518\u2192\n   519\u2192\treturn err\n   520\u2192}\n   521\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
23. Read @ -
Input

  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/storage/sql/common/segment.go"
