Output
"     1\u2192package common\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192import (\n     4\u2192\t\"context\"\n     5\u2192\t\"database/sql\"\n     6\u2192\t\"encoding/base64\"\n     7\u2192\t\"encoding/json\"\n     8\u2192\t\"errors\"\n     9\u2192\t\"fmt\"\n    10\u2192\t\"strings\"\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192\tsq \"github.com/Masterminds/squirrel\"\n    13\u2192\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n    14\u2192\n    15\u2192\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n    16\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n    17\u2192\tfliptsql \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n    18\u2192\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n    19\u2192)\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192// GetSegment gets a segment\n    22\u2192func (s *Store) GetSegment(ctx context.Context, req storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n    23\u2192\tvar (\n    24\u2192\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n    25\u2192\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n    26\u2192\n    27\u2192\t\tsegment = &flipt.Segment{}\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192\t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, match_type, created_at, updated_at\").\n    30\u2192\t\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n    31\u2192\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": req.Key}).\n    32\u2192\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n    33\u2192\t\t\tScan(\n    34\u2192\t\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n    35\u2192\t\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n    36\u2192\t\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n    37\u2192\t\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n    38\u2192\t\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n    39\u2192\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n    40\u2192\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n    41\u2192\t)\n    42\u2192\n    43\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    44\u2192\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n    45\u2192\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"segment %q\", req)\n    46\u2192\t\t}\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    49\u2192\t}\n    50\u2192\n    51\u2192\tsegment.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n    52\u2192\tsegment.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n    55\u2192\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n    56\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": segment.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": segment.Key}}).\n    57\u2192\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n    60\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    61\u2192\t\treturn segment, err\n    62\u2192\t}\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192\tdefer func() {\n    65\u2192\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n    66\u2192\t\t\terr = cerr\n    67\u2192\t\t}\n    68\u2192\t}()\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192\tfor rows.Next() {\n    71\u2192\t\tvar (\n    72\u2192\t\t\tconstraint           flipt.Constraint\n    73\u2192\t\t\tdescription          sql.NullString\n    74\u2192\t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n    75\u2192\t\t)\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n    78\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Id,\n    79\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.NamespaceKey,\n    80\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.SegmentKey,\n    81\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Type,\n    82\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Property,\n    83\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Operator,\n    84\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Value,\n    85\u2192\t\t\t&description,\n    86\u2192\t\t\t&createdAt,\n    87\u2192\t\t\t&updatedAt); err != nil {\n    88\u2192\t\t\treturn segment, err\n    89\u2192\t\t}\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192\t\tconstraint.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n    92\u2192\t\tconstraint.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n    93\u2192\t\tconstraint.Description = description.String\n    94\u2192\t\tsegment.Constraints = append(segment.Constraints, &constraint)\n    95\u2192\t}\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192\treturn segment, rows.Err()\n    98\u2192}\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192type optionalConstraint struct {\n   101\u2192\tId           sql.NullString\n   102\u2192\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n   103\u2192\tSegmentKey   sql.NullString\n   104\u2192\tType         sql.NullInt32\n   105\u2192\tProperty     sql.NullString\n   106\u2192\tOperator     sql.NullString\n   107\u2192\tValue        sql.NullString\n   108\u2192\tDescription  sql.NullString\n   109\u2192\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n   110\u2192\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n   111\u2192}\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192// ListSegments lists all segments\n   114\u2192func (s *Store) ListSegments(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error) {\n   115\u2192\tvar (\n   116\u2192\t\tsegments []*flipt.Segment\n   117\u2192\t\tresults  = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment]{}\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, match_type, created_at, updated_at\").\n   120\u2192\t\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n   121\u2192\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n   122\u2192\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n   123\u2192\t)\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192\tif req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n   126\u2192\t\tquery = query.Limit(req.QueryParams.Limit + 1)\n   127\u2192\t}\n   128\u2192\n   129\u2192\tvar offset uint64\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192\tif req.QueryParams.PageToken != \"\" {\n   132\u2192\t\ttoken, err := decodePageToken(s.logger, req.QueryParams.PageToken)\n   133\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   134\u2192\t\t\treturn results, err\n   135\u2192\t\t}\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192\t\toffset = token.Offset\n   138\u2192\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n   139\u2192\t} else if req.QueryParams.Offset > 0 {\n   140\u2192\t\toffset = req.QueryParams.Offset\n   141\u2192\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n   142\u2192\t}\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n   145\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   146\u2192\t\treturn results, err\n   147\u2192\t}\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192\tdefer func() {\n   150\u2192\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n   151\u2192\t\t\terr = cerr\n   152\u2192\t\t}\n   153\u2192\t}()\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192\t// keep track of segments we've seen so we don't append duplicates because of the join\n   156\u2192\tsegmentsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Segment)\n   157\u2192\n   158\u2192\tfor rows.Next() {\n   159\u2192\t\tvar (\n   160\u2192\t\t\tsegment    = &flipt.Segment{}\n   161\u2192\t\t\tsCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n   162\u2192\t\t\tsUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n   163\u2192\t\t)\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n   166\u2192\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n   167\u2192\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n   168\u2192\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n   169\u2192\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n   170\u2192\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n   171\u2192\t\t\t&sCreatedAt,\n   172\u2192\t\t\t&sUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n   173\u2192\t\t\treturn results, err\n   174\u2192\t\t}\n   175\u2192\n   176\u2192\t\tsegment.CreatedAt = sCreatedAt.Timestamp\n   177\u2192\t\tsegment.UpdatedAt = sUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192\t\tsegments = append(segments, segment)\n   180\u2192\t\tsegmentsByKey[segment.Key] = segment\n   181\u2192\t}\n   182\u2192\n   183\u2192\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n   184\u2192\t\treturn results, err\n   185\u2192\t}\n   186\u2192\n   187\u2192\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n   188\u2192\t\treturn results, err\n   189\u2192\t}\n   190\u2192\n   191\u2192\tif err := s.setConstraints(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), segmentsByKey); err != nil {\n   192\u2192\t\treturn results, err\n   193\u2192\t}\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192\tvar next *flipt.Segment\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192\tif len(segments) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n   198\u2192\t\tnext = segments[len(segments)-1]\n   199\u2192\t\tsegments = segments[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n   200\u2192\t}\n   201\u2192\n   202\u2192\tresults.Results = segments\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192\tif next != nil {\n   205\u2192\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(segments))})\n   206\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   207\u2192\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n   208\u2192\t\t}\n   209\u2192\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n   210\u2192\t}\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192\treturn results, nil\n   213\u2192}\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192func (s *Store) setConstraints(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, segmentsByKey map[string]*flipt.Segment) error {\n   216\u2192\tallSegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(segmentsByKey))\n   217\u2192\tfor k := range segmentsByKey {\n   218\u2192\t\tallSegmentKeys = append(allSegmentKeys, k)\n   219\u2192\t}\n   220\u2192\n   221\u2192\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n   222\u2192\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n   223\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": namespaceKey, \"segment_key\": allSegmentKeys}).\n   224\u2192\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at\")\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n   227\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   228\u2192\t\treturn err\n   229\u2192\t}\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192\tdefer func() {\n   232\u2192\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n   233\u2192\t\t\terr = cerr\n   234\u2192\t\t}\n   235\u2192\t}()\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192\tfor rows.Next() {\n   238\u2192\t\tvar (\n   239\u2192\t\t\tconstraint optionalConstraint\n   240\u2192\t\t\tcCreatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n   241\u2192\t\t\tcUpdatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n   242\u2192\t\t)\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n   245\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Id,\n   246\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.NamespaceKey,\n   247\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.SegmentKey,\n   248\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Type,\n   249\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Property,\n   250\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Operator,\n   251\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Value,\n   252\u2192\t\t\t&constraint.Description,\n   253\u2192\t\t\t&cCreatedAt,\n   254\u2192\t\t\t&cUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n   255\u2192\t\t\treturn err\n   256\u2192\t\t}\n   257\u2192\n   258\u2192\t\tif segment, ok := segmentsByKey[constraint.SegmentKey.String]; ok {\n   259\u2192\t\t\tsegment.Constraints = append(segment.Constraints, &flipt.Constraint{\n   260\u2192\t\t\t\tId:           constraint.Id.String,\n   261\u2192\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: constraint.NamespaceKey.String,\n   262\u2192\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   constraint.SegmentKey.String,\n   263\u2192\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType(constraint.Type.Int32),\n   264\u2192\t\t\t\tProperty:     constraint.Property.String,\n   265\u2192\t\t\t\tOperator:     constraint.Operator.String,\n   266\u2192\t\t\t\tValue:        constraint.Value.String,\n   267\u2192\t\t\t\tDescription:  constraint.Description.String,\n   268\u2192\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:    cCreatedAt.Timestamp,\n   269\u2192\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    cUpdatedAt.Timestamp,\n   270\u2192\t\t\t})\n   271\u2192\t\t}\n   272\u2192\t}\n   273\u2192\n   274\u2192\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n   275\u2192\t\treturn err\n   276\u2192\t}\n   277\u2192\n   278\u2192\treturn rows.Close()\n   279\u2192}\n   280\u2192\n   281\u2192// CountSegments counts all segments\n   282\u2192func (s *Store) CountSegments(ctx context.Context, ns storage.NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error) {\n   283\u2192\tvar count uint64\n   284\u2192\n   285\u2192\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"COUNT(*)\").\n   286\u2192\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n   287\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": ns.Namespace()}).\n   288\u2192\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n   289\u2192\t\tScan(&count); err != nil {\n   290\u2192\t\treturn 0, err\n   291\u2192\t}\n   292\u2192\n   293\u2192\treturn count, nil\n   294\u2192}\n   295\u2192\n   296\u2192// CreateSegment creates a segment\n   297\u2192func (s *Store) CreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n   298\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   299\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   300\u2192\t}\n   301\u2192\n   302\u2192\tvar (\n   303\u2192\t\tnow     = flipt.Now()\n   304\u2192\t\tsegment = &flipt.Segment{\n   305\u2192\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n   306\u2192\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n   307\u2192\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n   308\u2192\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n   309\u2192\t\t\tMatchType:    r.MatchType,\n   310\u2192\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n   311\u2192\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n   312\u2192\t\t}\n   313\u2192\t)\n   314\u2192\n   315\u2192\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"segments\").\n   316\u2192\t\tColumns(\"namespace_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"match_type\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n   317\u2192\t\tValues(\n   318\u2192\t\t\tsegment.NamespaceKey,\n   319\u2192\t\t\tsegment.Key,\n   320\u2192\t\t\tsegment.Name,\n   321\u2192\t\t\tsegment.Description,\n   322\u2192\t\t\tsegment.MatchType,\n   323\u2192\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: segment.CreatedAt},\n   324\u2192\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: segment.UpdatedAt}).\n   325\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n   326\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   327\u2192\t}\n   328\u2192\n   329\u2192\treturn segment, nil\n   330\u2192}\n   331\u2192\n   332\u2192// UpdateSegment updates an existing segment\n   333\u2192func (s *Store) UpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n   334\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   335\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   336\u2192\t}\n   337\u2192\n   338\u2192\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"segments\").\n   339\u2192\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n   340\u2192\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n   341\u2192\t\tSet(\"match_type\", r.MatchType).\n   342\u2192\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n   343\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey, \"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key})\n   344\u2192\n   345\u2192\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n   346\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   347\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   348\u2192\t}\n   349\u2192\n   350\u2192\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n   351\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   352\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   353\u2192\t}\n   354\u2192\n   355\u2192\tp := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key)\n   356\u2192\n   357\u2192\tif count != 1 {\n   358\u2192\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"segment %q\", p)\n   359\u2192\t}\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192\treturn s.GetSegment(ctx, p)\n   362\u2192}\n   363\u2192\n   364\u2192// DeleteSegment deletes a segment\n   365\u2192func (s *Store) DeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) error {\n   366\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   367\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   368\u2192\t}\n   369\u2192\n   370\u2192\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"segments\").\n   371\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}}).\n   372\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n   373\u2192\n   374\u2192\treturn err\n   375\u2192}\n   376\u2192\n   377\u2192// CreateConstraint creates a constraint\n   378\u2192func (s *Store) CreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n   379\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   380\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   381\u2192\t}\n   382\u2192\n   383\u2192\tvar (\n   384\u2192\t\toperator = strings.ToLower(r.Operator)\n   385\u2192\t\tnow      = flipt.Now()\n   386\u2192\t\tc        = &flipt.Constraint{\n   387\u2192\t\t\tId:           uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n   388\u2192\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n   389\u2192\t\t\tSegmentKey:   r.SegmentKey,\n   390\u2192\t\t\tType:         r.Type,\n   391\u2192\t\t\tProperty:     r.Property,\n   392\u2192\t\t\tOperator:     operator,\n   393\u2192\t\t\tValue:        r.Value,\n   394\u2192\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n   395\u2192\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n   396\u2192\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n   397\u2192\t\t}\n   398\u2192\t)\n   399\u2192\n   400\u2192\t// unset value if operator does not require it\n   401\u2192\tif _, ok := flipt.NoValueOperators[c.Operator]; ok {\n   402\u2192\t\tc.Value = \"\"\n   403\u2192\t}\n   404\u2192\n   405\u2192\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"constraints\").\n   406\u2192\t\tColumns(\"id\", \"namespace_key\", \"segment_key\", \"type\", \"property\", \"operator\", \"value\", \"description\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n   407\u2192\t\tValues(\n   408\u2192\t\t\tc.Id,\n   409\u2192\t\t\tc.NamespaceKey,\n   410\u2192\t\t\tc.SegmentKey,\n   411\u2192\t\t\tc.Type,\n   412\u2192\t\t\tc.Property,\n   413\u2192\t\t\tc.Operator,\n   414\u2192\t\t\tc.Value,\n   415\u2192\t\t\tc.Description,\n   416\u2192\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: c.CreatedAt},\n   417\u2192\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: c.UpdatedAt}).\n   418\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n   419\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   420\u2192\t}\n   421\u2192\n   422\u2192\treturn c, nil\n   423\u2192}\n   424\u2192\n   425\u2192// UpdateConstraint updates an existing constraint\n   426\u2192func (s *Store) UpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n   427\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   428\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   429\u2192\t}\n   430\u2192\n   431\u2192\tvar (\n   432\u2192\t\twhereClause = sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": r.SegmentKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}\n   433\u2192\t\toperator    = strings.ToLower(r.Operator)\n   434\u2192\t)\n   435\u2192\n   436\u2192\t// unset value if operator does not require it\n   437\u2192\tif _, ok := flipt.NoValueOperators[operator]; ok {\n   438\u2192\t\tr.Value = \"\"\n   439\u2192\t}\n   440\u2192\n   441\u2192\tres, err := s.builder.Update(\"constraints\").\n   442\u2192\t\tSet(\"type\", r.Type).\n   443\u2192\t\tSet(\"property\", r.Property).\n   444\u2192\t\tSet(\"operator\", operator).\n   445\u2192\t\tSet(\"value\", r.Value).\n   446\u2192\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n   447\u2192\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n   448\u2192\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n   449\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n   450\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   451\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   452\u2192\t}\n   453\u2192\n   454\u2192\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n   455\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   456\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   457\u2192\t}\n   458\u2192\n   459\u2192\tif count != 1 {\n   460\u2192\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"constraint %q\", r.Id)\n   461\u2192\t}\n   462\u2192\n   463\u2192\tvar (\n   464\u2192\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n   465\u2192\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n   466\u2192\n   467\u2192\t\tc = &flipt.Constraint{}\n   468\u2192\t)\n   469\u2192\n   470\u2192\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n   471\u2192\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n   472\u2192\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n   473\u2192\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n   474\u2192\t\tScan(&c.Id, &c.NamespaceKey, &c.SegmentKey, &c.Type, &c.Property, &c.Operator, &c.Value, &c.Description, &createdAt, &updatedAt); err != nil {\n   475\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   476\u2192\t}\n   477\u2192\n   478\u2192\tc.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n   479\u2192\tc.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n   480\u2192\n   481\u2192\treturn c, nil\n   482\u2192}\n   483\u2192\n   484\u2192// DeleteConstraint deletes a constraint\n   485\u2192func (s *Store) DeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) error {\n   486\u2192\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n   487\u2192\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n   488\u2192\t}\n   489\u2192\n   490\u2192\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"constraints\").\n   491\u2192\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": r.SegmentKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}).\n   492\u2192\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n   493\u2192\n   494\u2192\treturn err\n   495\u2192}\n   496\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"     1\u2192package storage\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192import (\n     4\u2192\t\"context\"\n     5\u2192\t\"fmt\"\n     6\u2192\t\"path\"\n     7\u2192\n     8\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n     9\u2192\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n    10\u2192)\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192const (\n    13\u2192\t// DefaultListLimit is the default limit applied to any list operation page size when one is not provided.\n    14\u2192\tDefaultListLimit uint64 = 25\n    15\u2192\n    16\u2192\t// MaxListLimit is the upper limit applied to any list operation page size.\n    17\u2192\tMaxListLimit uint64 = 100\n    18\u2192)\n    19\u2192\n    20\u2192// EvaluationRule represents a rule and constraints required for evaluating if a\n    21\u2192// given flagKey matches a segment\n    22\u2192type EvaluationRule struct {\n    23\u2192\tID              string                        `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n    24\u2192\tNamespaceKey    string                        `json:\"namespace_key,omitempty\"`\n    25\u2192\tFlagKey         string                        `json:\"flag_key,omitempty\"`\n    26\u2192\tSegments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:\"segments,omitempty\"`\n    27\u2192\tRank            int32                         `json:\"rank,omitempty\"`\n    28\u2192\tSegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:\"segmentOperator,omitempty\"`\n    29\u2192}\n    30\u2192\n    31\u2192type EvaluationSegment struct {\n    32\u2192\tSegmentKey  string                 `json:\"segment_key,omitempty\"`\n    33\u2192\tMatchType   flipt.MatchType        `json:\"match_type,omitempty\"`\n    34\u2192\tConstraints []EvaluationConstraint `json:\"constraints,omitempty\"`\n    35\u2192}\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192// EvaluationRollout represents a rollout in the form that helps with evaluation.\n    38\u2192type EvaluationRollout struct {\n    39\u2192\tNamespaceKey string            `json:\"namespace_key,omitempty\"`\n    40\u2192\tRolloutType  flipt.RolloutType `json:\"rollout_type,omitempty\"`\n    41\u2192\tRank         int32             `json:\"rank,omitempty\"`\n    42\u2192\tThreshold    *RolloutThreshold `json:\"threshold,omitempty\"`\n    43\u2192\tSegment      *RolloutSegment   `json:\"segment,omitempty\"`\n    44\u2192}\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192// RolloutThreshold represents Percentage(s) for use in evaluation.\n    47\u2192type RolloutThreshold struct {\n    48\u2192\tPercentage float32 `json:\"percentage,omitempty\"`\n    49\u2192\tValue      bool    `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n    50\u2192}\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192// RolloutSegment represents Segment(s) for use in evaluation.\n    53\u2192type RolloutSegment struct {\n    54\u2192\tValue           bool                          `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n    55\u2192\tSegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:\"segment_operator,omitempty\"`\n    56\u2192\tSegments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:\"segments,omitempty\"`\n    57\u2192}\n    58\u2192\n    59\u2192// EvaluationConstraint represents a segment constraint that is used for evaluation\n    60\u2192type EvaluationConstraint struct {\n    61\u2192\tID       string               `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n    62\u2192\tType     flipt.ComparisonType `json:\"comparison_type,omitempty\"`\n    63\u2192\tProperty string               `json:\"property,omitempty\"`\n    64\u2192\tOperator string               `json:\"operator,omitempty\"`\n    65\u2192\tValue    string               `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n    66\u2192}\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192// EvaluationDistribution represents a rule distribution along with its variant for evaluation\n    69\u2192type EvaluationDistribution struct {\n    70\u2192\tID                string\n    71\u2192\tRuleID            string\n    72\u2192\tVariantID         string\n    73\u2192\tRollout           float32\n    74\u2192\tVariantKey        string\n    75\u2192\tVariantAttachment string\n    76\u2192}\n    77\u2192\n    78\u2192type QueryParams struct {\n    79\u2192\tLimit     uint64\n    80\u2192\tOffset    uint64 // deprecated\n    81\u2192\tPageToken string\n    82\u2192\tOrder     Order // not exposed to the user yet\n    83\u2192}\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192// Normalize adjusts query parameters within the enforced boundaries.\n    86\u2192// For example, limit is adjusted to be in the range (0, max].\n    87\u2192// Given the limit is not supplied (0) it is set to the default limit.\n    88\u2192func (q *QueryParams) Normalize() {\n    89\u2192\tif q.Limit == 0 {\n    90\u2192\t\tq.Limit = DefaultListLimit\n    91\u2192\t}\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192\tif q.Limit > MaxListLimit {\n    94\u2192\t\tq.Limit = MaxListLimit\n    95\u2192\t}\n    96\u2192}\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192type QueryOption func(p *QueryParams)\n    99\u2192\n   100\u2192func NewQueryParams(opts ...QueryOption) (params QueryParams) {\n   101\u2192\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n   102\u2192\t\topt(&params)\n   103\u2192\t}\n   104\u2192\n   105\u2192\t// NOTE(georgemac): I wanted to normalize under all circumstances\n   106\u2192\t// However, for legacy reasons the core flag state APIs expect\n   107\u2192\t// the default limit to be == 0. Normalize sets it to the default\n   108\u2192\t// constant which is > 0.\n   109\u2192\t// If we ever break this contract then we can normalize here.\n   110\u2192\t// params.Normalize()\n   111\u2192\n   112\u2192\treturn params\n   113\u2192}\n   114\u2192\n   115\u2192func WithLimit(limit uint64) QueryOption {\n   116\u2192\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n   117\u2192\t\tp.Limit = limit\n   118\u2192\t}\n   119\u2192}\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192func WithOffset(offset uint64) QueryOption {\n   122\u2192\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n   123\u2192\t\tp.Offset = offset\n   124\u2192\t}\n   125\u2192}\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192func WithPageToken(pageToken string) QueryOption {\n   128\u2192\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n   129\u2192\t\tp.PageToken = pageToken\n   130\u2192\t}\n   131\u2192}\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192type Order uint8\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192const (\n   136\u2192\tOrderAsc Order = iota\n   137\u2192\tOrderDesc\n   138\u2192)\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192func (o Order) String() string {\n   141\u2192\tswitch o {\n   142\u2192\tcase OrderAsc:\n   143\u2192\t\treturn \"ASC\"\n   144\u2192\tcase OrderDesc:\n   145\u2192\t\treturn \"DESC\"\n   146\u2192\t}\n   147\u2192\treturn \"\"\n   148\u2192}\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192func WithOrder(order Order) QueryOption {\n   151\u2192\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n   152\u2192\t\tp.Order = order\n   153\u2192\t}\n   154\u2192}\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192// ReadOnlyStore is a storage implementation which only supports\n   157\u2192// reading the various types of state configuring within Flipt\n   158\u2192type ReadOnlyStore interface {\n   159\u2192\tReadOnlyNamespaceStore\n   160\u2192\tReadOnlyFlagStore\n   161\u2192\tReadOnlySegmentStore\n   162\u2192\tReadOnlyRuleStore\n   163\u2192\tReadOnlyRolloutStore\n   164\u2192\tEvaluationStore\n   165\u2192\tfmt.Stringer\n   166\u2192}\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192// Store supports reading and writing all the resources within Flipt\n   169\u2192type Store interface {\n   170\u2192\tNamespaceStore\n   171\u2192\tFlagStore\n   172\u2192\tSegmentStore\n   173\u2192\tRuleStore\n   174\u2192\tRolloutStore\n   175\u2192\tEvaluationStore\n   176\u2192\tfmt.Stringer\n   177\u2192}\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192type ResultSet[T any] struct {\n   180\u2192\tResults       []T    `json:\"results\"`\n   181\u2192\tNextPageToken string `json:\"next_page_token\"`\n   182\u2192}\n   183\u2192\n   184\u2192const DefaultNamespace = \"default\"\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192// EvaluationStore returns data necessary for evaluation\n   187\u2192type EvaluationStore interface {\n   188\u2192\t// GetEvaluationRules returns rules applicable to flagKey provided\n   189\u2192\t// Note: Rules MUST be returned in order by Rank\n   190\u2192\tGetEvaluationRules(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) ([]*EvaluationRule, error)\n   191\u2192\tGetEvaluationDistributions(ctx context.Context, rule IDRequest) ([]*EvaluationDistribution, error)\n   192\u2192\t// GetEvaluationRollouts returns rollouts applicable to namespaceKey + flagKey provided\n   193\u2192\t// Note: Rollouts MUST be returned in order by rank\n   194\u2192\tGetEvaluationRollouts(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) ([]*EvaluationRollout, error)\n   195\u2192}\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192// ReadOnlyNamespaceStore support retrieval of namespaces only\n   198\u2192type ReadOnlyNamespaceStore interface {\n   199\u2192\tGetNamespace(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n   200\u2192\tListNamespaces(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Namespace], error)\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

error)\n   227\u2192\tDeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) error\n   228\u2192}\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192// ReadOnlySegmentStore supports retrieval of segments and context.Context, req *ListRequest[NamespaceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error)\n   234\u2192\tCountSegments(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error)\n   235\u2192}\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192// SegmentStore stores and retrieves segments and constraints\n   238\u2192type SegmentStore interface {\n   239\u2192\tReadOnlySegmentStore\n   240\u2192\tCreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n   241\u2192\tUpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n   242\u2192\tDeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) error\n   243\u2192\tCreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error)\n   244\u2192\tUpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error)\n   245\u2192\tDeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) error\n   246\u2192}\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192// ReadOnlyRuleStore supports retrieval of rules and distributions\n   249\u2192type ReadOnlyRuleStore interface {\n   250\u2192\tGetRule(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest, id string) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n   251\u2192\tListRules(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ResourceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Rule], error)\n   252\u2192\tCountRules(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) (uint64, error)\n   253\u2192}\n   254\u2192\n   255\u2192// RuleStore stores and retrieves rules and distributions\n   256\u2192type RuleStore interface {\n   257\u2192\tReadOnlyRuleStore\n   258\u2192\tCreateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n   259\u2192\tUpdateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n   260\u2192\tDeleteRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRuleRequest) error\n   261\u2192\tOrderRules(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRulesRequest) error\n   262\u2192\tCreateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error)\n   263\u2192\tUpdateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error)\n   264\u2192\tDeleteDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteDistributionRequest) error\n   265\u2192}\n   266\u2192\n   267\u2192// ReadOnlyRolloutStore supports retrieval of rollouts\n   268\u2192type ReadOnlyRolloutStore interface {\n   269\u2192\tGetRollout(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest, id string) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n   270\u2192\tListRollouts(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ResourceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout], error)\n   271\u2192\tCountRollouts(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) (uint64, error)\n   272\u2192}\n   273\u2192\n   274\u2192// RolloutStore supports storing and retrieving rollouts\n   275\u2192type RolloutStore interface {\n   276\u2192\tReadOnlyRolloutStore\n   277\u2192\tCreateRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRolloutRequest) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n   278\u2192\tUpdateRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n   279\u2192\tDeleteRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRolloutRequest) error\n   280\u2192\tOrderRollouts(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRolloutsRequest) error\n   281\u2192}\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192// ListRequest is a generic container for the parameters required to perform a list operation.\n   284\u2192// It contains a generic type T intended for a list predicate.\n   285\u2192// It also contains a QueryParams object containing pagination constraints.\n   286\u2192type ListRequest[P any] struct {\n   287\u2192\tPredicate   P\n   288\u2192\tQueryParams QueryParams\n   289\u2192}\n   290\u2192\n   291\u2192// ListOption is a function which can configure a ListRequest.\n   292\u2192type ListOption[T any] func(*ListRequest[T])\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192// ListWithQueryParamOptions takes a set of functional options for QueryParam and returns a ListOption\n   295\u2192// which applies them in order on the provided ListRequest.\n   296\u2192func ListWithQueryParamOptions[T any](opts ...QueryOption) ListOption[T] {\n   297\u2192\treturn func(r *ListRequest[T]) {\n   298\u2192\t\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n   299\u2192\t\t\topt(&r.QueryParams)\n   300\u2192\t\t}\n   301\u2192\t}\n   302\u2192}\n   303\u2192\n   304\u2192// PageParameter is any type which exposes limit and page token\n   305\u2192// accessors used to identify pages.\n   306\u2192type PageParameter interface {\n   307\u2192\tGetLimit() int32\n   308\u2192\tGetPageToken() string\n   309\u2192}\n   310\u2192\n   311\u2192// OffsetPageParameter is a type which exposes an additional offset\n   312\u2192// accessor for legacy paging implementations (page token supersedes).\n   313\u2192type OffsetPageParameter interface {\n   314\u2192\tPageParameter\n   315\u2192\tGetOffset() int32\n   316\u2192}\n   317\u2192\n   318\u2192// ListWithParameters constructs a new ListRequest using the page parameters\n   319\u2192// exposed by the provided PageParameter implementation.\n   320\u2192func ListWithParameters[T any](t T, p PageParameter) *ListRequest[T] {\n   321\u2192\topts := []QueryOption{\n   322\u2192\t\tWithLimit(uint64(p.GetLimit())),\n   323\u2192\t\tWithPageToken(p.GetPageToken()),\n   324\u2192\t}\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192\tif po, ok := p.(OffsetPageParameter); ok {\n   327\u2192\t\topts = append(opts, WithOffset(uint64(po.GetOffset())))\n   328\u2192\t}\n   329\u2192\n   330\u2192\treturn ListWithOptions[T](t, ListWithQueryParamOptions[T](opts...))\n   331\u2192}\n   332\u2192\n   333\u2192// ListWithOptions constructs a new ListRequest using the provided ListOption.\n   334\u2192func ListWithOptions[T any](t T, opts ...ListOption[T]) *ListRequest[T] {\n   335\u2192\treq := &ListRequest[T]{\n   336\u2192\t\tPredicate: t,\n   337\u2192\t}\n   338\u2192\n   339\u2192\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n   340\u2192\t\topt(req)\n   341\u2192\t}\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192\treturn req\n   344\u2192}\n   345\u2192\n   346\u2192// Reference is a string which can refer to either a concrete\n   347\u2192// revision or it can be an indirect named reference.\n   348\u2192type Reference string\n   349\u2192\n   350\u2192// ReferenceRequest is used to identify a request predicated solely by a revision reference.\n   351\u2192// This is primarily used for namespaces as it is the highest level domain model.\n   352\u2192type ReferenceRequest struct {\n   353\u2192\tReference\n   354\u2192}\n   355\u2192\n   356\u2192// WithReference sets the provided reference identifier on a *ReferenceRequest.\n   357\u2192func WithReference(ref string) containers.Option[ReferenceRequest] {\n   358\u2192\treturn func(rp *ReferenceRequest) {\n   359\u2192\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n   360\u2192\t\t\trp.Reference = Reference(ref)\n   361\u2192\t\t}\n   362\u2192\t}\n   363\u2192}\n   364\u2192\n   365\u2192// ListWithReference is a ListOption constrained to ReferenceRequest types.\n   366\u2192// It sets the reference on the resulting list request.\n   367\u2192func ListWithReference(ref string) ListOption[ReferenceRequest] {\n   368\u2192\treturn func(rp *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) {\n   369\u2192\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n   370\u2192\t\t\trp.Predicate.Reference = Reference(ref)\n   371\u2192\t\t}\n   372\u2192\t}\n   373\u2192}\n   374\u2192\n   375\u2192// NamespaceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by both a revision and a namespace.\n   376\u2192// This is used to identify namespaces and list resources directly beneath them (e.g. flags and segments).\n   377\u2192type NamespaceRequest struct {\n   378\u2192\tReferenceRequest\n   379\u2192\tkey string\n   380\u2192}\n   381\u2192\n   382\u2192// NewNamespace constructs a *NamespaceRequest from the provided key string.\n   383\u2192// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\n   384\u2192func NewNamespace(key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) NamespaceRequest {\n   385\u2192\tp := NamespaceRequest{key: key}\n   386\u2192\n   387\u2192\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192\treturn p\n   390\u2192}\n   391\u2192\n   392\u2192// String returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n   393\u2192// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n   394\u2192// is returned instead.\n   395\u2192func (n NamespaceRequest) String() string {\n   396\u2192\treturn n.Namespace()\n   397\u2192}\n   398\u2192\n   399\u2192// Namespace returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n   400\u2192// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n   401\u2192// is returned instead.\n   402\u2192func (n NamespaceRequest) Namespace() string {\n   403\u2192\tif n.key == \"\" {\n   404\u2192\t\treturn flipt.DefaultNamespace\n   405\u2192\t}\n   406\u2192\n   407\u2192\treturn n.key\n   408\u2192}\n   409\u2192\n   410\u2192// ResourceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by revision, namespace and a key.\n   411\u2192// This is used for core resources (e.g. flag and segment) as well as to list sub-resources (e.g. rules and constraints).\n   412\u2192type ResourceRequest struct {\n   413\u2192\tNamespaceRequest\n   414\u2192\tKey string\n   415\u2192}\n   416\u2192\n   417\u2192// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n   418\u2192// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\n   419\u2192func NewResource(ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n   420\u2192\tp := ResourceRequest{\n   421\u2192\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n   422\u2192\t\t\tkey: ns,\n   423\u2192\t\t},\n   424\u2192\t\tKey: key,\n   425\u2192\t}\n   426\u2192\n   427\u2192\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n   428\u2192\n   429\u2192\treturn p\n   430\u2192}\n   431\u2192\n   432\u2192// String returns a representation of the combined resource namespace and key separated by a '/'.\n   433\u2192func (p ResourceRequest) String() string {\n   434\u2192\treturn path.Join(p.Namespace(), p.Key)\n   435\u2192}\n   436\u2192\n   437\u2192// IDRequest is used to identify any sub-resources which have a unique random identifier.\n   438\u2192// This is used for sub-resources with no key identifiers (e.g. rules and rollouts).\n   439\u2192type IDRequest struct {\n   440\u2192\tReferenceRequest\n   441\u2192\tID string\n   442\u2192}\n   443\u2192\n   444\u2192// NewID constructs and configures a new *IDRequest with the provided ID string.\n   445\u2192// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\n   446\u2192func NewID(id string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) IDRequest {\n   447\u2192\tp := IDRequest{ID: id}\n   448\u2192\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n   449\u2192\treturn p\n   450\u2192}\n   451\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

{
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/storage/storage.go",
  "new_string": "// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewResource(ctx context.Context, ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n\tp := ResourceRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n\t\t\tkey: ns,\n\t\t},\n\t\tKey: key,\n\t}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}",
  "old_string": "// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewResource(ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n\tp := ResourceRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n\t\t\tkey: ns,\n\t\t},\n\t\tKey: key,\n\t}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}",
  "replace_all": false
}
Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/storage/storage.go",
  "newString": "// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewResource(ctx context.Context, ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n\tp := ResourceRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n\t\t\tkey: ns,\n\t\t},\n\t\tKey: key,\n\t}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}",
  "oldString": "// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewResource(ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n\tp := ResourceRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n\t\t\tkey: ns,\n\t\t},\n\t\tKey: key,\n\t}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}",
  "originalFile": "package storage\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"path\"\n\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\t// DefaultListLimit is the default limit applied to any list operation page size when one is not provided.\n\tDefaultListLimit uint64 = 25\n\n\t// MaxListLimit is the upper limit applied to any list operation page size.\n\tMaxListLimit uint64 = 100\n)\n\n// EvaluationRule represents a rule and constraints required for evaluating if a\n// given flagKey matches a segment\ntype EvaluationRule struct {\n\tID              string                        `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n\tNamespaceKey    string                        `json:\"namespace_key,omitempty\"`\n\tFlagKey         string                        `json:\"flag_key,omitempty\"`\n\tSegments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:\"segments,omitempty\"`\n\tRank            int32                         `json:\"rank,omitempty\"`\n\tSegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:\"segmentOperator,omitempty\"`\n}\n\ntype EvaluationSegment struct {\n\tSegmentKey  string                 `json:\"segment_key,omitempty\"`\n\tMatchType   flipt.MatchType        `json:\"match_type,omitempty\"`\n\tConstraints []EvaluationConstraint `json:\"constraints,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationRollout represents a rollout in the form that helps with evaluation.\ntype EvaluationRollout struct {\n\tNamespaceKey string            `json:\"namespace_key,omitempty\"`\n\tRolloutType  flipt.RolloutType `json:\"rollout_type,omitempty\"`\n\tRank         int32             `json:\"rank,omitempty\"`\n\tThreshold    *RolloutThreshold `json:\"threshold,omitempty\"`\n\tSegment      *RolloutSegment   `json:\"segment,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// RolloutThreshold represents Percentage(s) for use in evaluation.\ntype RolloutThreshold struct {\n\tPercentage float32 `json:\"percentage,omitempty\"`\n\tValue      bool    `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// RolloutSegment represents Segment(s) for use in evaluation.\ntype RolloutSegment struct {\n\tValue           bool                          `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n\tSegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:\"segment_operator,omitempty\"`\n\tSegments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:\"segments,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationConstraint represents a segment constraint that is used for evaluation\ntype EvaluationConstraint struct {\n\tID       string               `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n\tType     flipt.ComparisonType `json:\"comparison_type,omitempty\"`\n\tProperty string               `json:\"property,omitempty\"`\n\tOperator string               `json:\"operator,omitempty\"`\n\tValue    string               `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationDistribution represents a rule distribution along with its variant for evaluation\ntype EvaluationDistribution struct {\n\tID                string\n\tRuleID            string\n\tVariantID         string\n\tRollout           float32\n\tVariantKey        string\n\tVariantAttachment string\n}\n\ntype QueryParams struct {\n\tLimit     uint64\n\tOffset    uint64 // deprecated\n\tPageToken string\n\tOrder     Order // not exposed to the user yet\n}\n\n// Normalize adjusts query parameters within the enforced boundaries.\n// For example, limit is adjusted to be in the range (0, max].\n// Given the limit is not supplied (0) it is set to the default limit.\nfunc (q *QueryParams) Normalize() {\n\tif q.Limit == 0 {\n\t\tq.Limit = DefaultListLimit\n\t}\n\n\tif q.Limit > MaxListLimit {\n\t\tq.Limit = MaxListLimit\n\t}\n}\n\ntype QueryOption func(p *QueryParams)\n\nfunc NewQueryParams(opts ...QueryOption) (params QueryParams) {\n\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\topt(&params)\n\t}\n\n\t// NOTE(georgemac): I wanted to normalize under all circumstances\n\t// However, for legacy reasons the core flag state APIs expect\n\t// the default limit to be == 0. Normalize sets it to the default\n\t// constant which is > 0.\n\t// If we ever break this contract then we can normalize here.\n\t// params.Normalize()\n\n\treturn params\n}\n\nfunc WithLimit(limit uint64) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Limit = limit\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc WithOffset(offset uint64) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Offset = offset\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc WithPageToken(pageToken string) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.PageToken = pageToken\n\t}\n}\n\ntype Order uint8\n\nconst (\n\tOrderAsc Order = iota\n\tOrderDesc\n)\n\nfunc (o Order) String() string {\n\tswitch o {\n\tcase OrderAsc:\n\t\treturn \"ASC\"\n\tcase OrderDesc:\n\t\treturn \"DESC\"\n\t}\n\treturn \"\"\n}\n\nfunc WithOrder(order Order) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Order = order\n\t}\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyStore is a storage implementation which only supports\n// reading the various types of state configuring within Flipt\ntype ReadOnlyStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyNamespaceStore\n\tReadOnlyFlagStore\n\tReadOnlySegmentStore\n\tReadOnlyRuleStore\n\tReadOnlyRolloutStore\n\tEvaluationStore\n\tfmt.Stringer\n}\n\n// Store supports reading and writing all the resources within Flipt\ntype Store interface {\n\tNamespaceStore\n\tFlagStore\n\tSegmentStore\n\tRuleStore\n\tRolloutStore\n\tEvaluationStore\n\tfmt.Stringer\n}\n\ntype ResultSet[T any] struct {\n\tResults       []T    `json:\"results\"`\n\tNextPageToken string `json:\"next_page_token\"`\n}\n\nconst DefaultNamespace = \"default\"\n\n// EvaluationStore returns data necessary for evaluation\ntype EvaluationStore interface {\n\t// GetEvaluationRules returns rules applicable to flagKey provided\n\t// Note: Rules MUST be returned in order by Rank\n\tGetEvaluationRules(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) ([]*EvaluationRule, error)\n\tGetEvaluationDistributions(ctx context.Context, rule IDRequest) ([]*EvaluationDistribution, error)\n\t// GetEvaluationRollouts returns rollouts applicable to namespaceKey + flagKey provided\n\t// Note: Rollouts MUST be returned in order by rank\n\tGetEvaluationRollouts(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) ([]*EvaluationRollout, error)\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyNamespaceStore support retrieval of namespaces only\ntype ReadOnlyNamespaceStore interface {\n\tGetNamespace(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tListNamespaces(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Namespace], error)\n\tCountNamespaces(ctx context.Context, req ReferenceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// NamespaceStore stores and retrieves namespaces\ntype NamespaceStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyNamespaceStore\n\tCreateNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tUpdateNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateNamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tDeleteNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteNamespaceRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyFlagStore supports retrieval of flags\ntype ReadOnlyFlagStore interface {\n\tGetFlag(ctx context.Context, req ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[NamespaceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\n\tCountFlags(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// FlagStore stores and retrieves flags and variants\ntype FlagStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyFlagStore\n\tCreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tUpdateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tDeleteFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteFlagRequest) error\n\tCreateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error)\n\tUpdateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error)\n\tDeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlySegmentStore supports retrieval of segments and constraints\ntype ReadOnlySegmentStore interface {\n\tGetSegment(ctx context.Context, req ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tListSegments(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[NamespaceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error)\n\tCountSegments(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// SegmentStore stores and retrieves segments and constraints\ntype SegmentStore interface {\n\tReadOnlySegmentStore\n\tCreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tUpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tDeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) error\n\tCreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error)\n\tUpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error)\n\tDeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyRuleStore supports retrieval of rules and distributions\ntype ReadOnlyRuleStore interface {\n\tGetRule(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest, id string) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tListRules(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ResourceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Rule], error)\n\tCountRules(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// RuleStore stores and retrieves rules and distributions\ntype RuleStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyRuleStore\n\tCreateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tUpdateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tDeleteRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRuleRequest) error\n\tOrderRules(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRulesRequest) error\n\tCreateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error)\n\tUpdateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error)\n\tDeleteDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteDistributionRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyRolloutStore supports retrieval of rollouts\ntype ReadOnlyRolloutStore interface {\n\tGetRollout(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest, id string) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tListRollouts(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ResourceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout], error)\n\tCountRollouts(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// RolloutStore supports storing and retrieving rollouts\ntype RolloutStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyRolloutStore\n\tCreateRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRolloutRequest) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tUpdateRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tDeleteRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRolloutRequest) error\n\tOrderRollouts(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRolloutsRequest) error\n}\n\n// ListRequest is a generic container for the parameters required to perform a list operation.\n// It contains a generic type T intended for a list predicate.\n// It also contains a QueryParams object containing pagination constraints.\ntype ListRequest[P any] struct {\n\tPredicate   P\n\tQueryParams QueryParams\n}\n\n// ListOption is a function which can configure a ListRequest.\ntype ListOption[T any] func(*ListRequest[T])\n\n// ListWithQueryParamOptions takes a set of functional options for QueryParam and returns a ListOption\n// which applies them in order on the provided ListRequest.\nfunc ListWithQueryParamOptions[T any](opts ...QueryOption) ListOption[T] {\n\treturn func(r *ListRequest[T]) {\n\t\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\t\topt(&r.QueryParams)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// PageParameter is any type which exposes limit and page token\n// accessors used to identify pages.\ntype PageParameter interface {\n\tGetLimit() int32\n\tGetPageToken() string\n}\n\n// OffsetPageParameter is a type which exposes an additional offset\n// accessor for legacy paging implementations (page token supersedes).\ntype OffsetPageParameter interface {\n\tPageParameter\n\tGetOffset() int32\n}\n\n// ListWithParameters constructs a new ListRequest using the page parameters\n// exposed by the provided PageParameter implementation.\nfunc ListWithParameters[T any](t T, p PageParameter) *ListRequest[T] {\n\topts := []QueryOption{\n\t\tWithLimit(uint64(p.GetLimit())),\n\t\tWithPageToken(p.GetPageToken()),\n\t}\n\n\tif po, ok := p.(OffsetPageParameter); ok {\n\t\topts = append(opts, WithOffset(uint64(po.GetOffset())))\n\t}\n\n\treturn ListWithOptions[T](t, ListWithQueryParamOptions[T](opts...))\n}\n\n// ListWithOptions constructs a new ListRequest using the provided ListOption.\nfunc ListWithOptions[T any](t T, opts ...ListOption[T]) *ListRequest[T] {\n\treq := &ListRequest[T]{\n\t\tPredicate: t,\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\topt(req)\n\t}\n\n\treturn req\n}\n\n// Reference is a string which can refer to either a concrete\n// revision or it can be an indirect named reference.\ntype Reference string\n\n// ReferenceRequest is used to identify a request predicated solely by a revision reference.\n// This is primarily used for namespaces as it is the highest level domain model.\ntype ReferenceRequest struct {\n\tReference\n}\n\n// WithReference sets the provided reference identifier on a *ReferenceRequest.\nfunc WithReference(ref string) containers.Option[ReferenceRequest] {\n\treturn func(rp *ReferenceRequest) {\n\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n\t\t\trp.Reference = Reference(ref)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// ListWithReference is a ListOption constrained to ReferenceRequest types.\n// It sets the reference on the resulting list request.\nfunc ListWithReference(ref string) ListOption[ReferenceRequest] {\n\treturn func(rp *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) {\n\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n\t\t\trp.Predicate.Reference = Reference(ref)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// NamespaceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by both a revision and a namespace.\n// This is used to identify namespaces and list resources directly beneath them (e.g. flags and segments).\ntype NamespaceRequest struct {\n\tReferenceRequest\n\tkey string\n}\n\n// NewNamespace constructs a *NamespaceRequest from the provided key string.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewNamespace(key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) NamespaceRequest {\n\tp := NamespaceRequest{key: key}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}\n\n// String returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n// is returned instead.\nfunc (n NamespaceRequest) String() string {\n\treturn n.Namespace()\n}\n\n// Namespace returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n// is returned instead.\nfunc (n NamespaceRequest) Namespace() string {\n\tif n.key == \"\" {\n\t\treturn flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\treturn n.key\n}\n\n// ResourceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by revision, namespace and a key.\n// This is used for core resources (e.g. flag and segment) as well as to list sub-resources (e.g. rules and constraints).\ntype ResourceRequest struct {\n\tNamespaceRequest\n\tKey string\n}\n\n// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewResource(ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n\tp := ResourceRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n\t\t\tkey: ns,\n\t\t},\n\t\tKey: key,\n\t}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}\n\n// String returns a representation of the combined resource namespace and key separated by a '/'.\nfunc (p ResourceRequest) String() string {\n\treturn path.Join(p.Namespace(), p.Key)\n}\n\n// IDRequest is used to identify any sub-resources which have a unique random identifier.\n// This is used for sub-resources with no key identifiers (e.g. rules and rollouts).\ntype IDRequest struct {\n\tReferenceRequest\n\tID string\n}\n\n// NewID constructs and configures a new *IDRequest with the provided ID string.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewID(id string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) IDRequest {\n\tp := IDRequest{ID: id}\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\treturn p\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "package data\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/blang/semver/v4\"\n\tgrpc_middleware \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/middleware/grpc\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n)\n\ntype EvaluationStore interface {\n\tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\n\tstorage.EvaluationStore\n}\n\ntype Server struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  EvaluationStore\n\n\tevaluation.UnimplementedDataServiceServer\n}\n\nfunc New(logger *zap.Logger, store EvaluationStore) *Server {\n\treturn &Server{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\n// RegisterGRPC registers the *Server onto the provided grpc Server.\nfunc (srv *Server) RegisterGRPC(server *grpc.Server) {\n\tevaluation.RegisterDataServiceServer(server, srv)\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationFlagType(f flipt.FlagType) evaluation.EvaluationFlagType {\n\tswitch f {\n\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s flipt.MatchType) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationSegmentOperator(s flipt.SegmentOperator) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator {\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c flipt.ComparisonType) evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\n\tswitch c {\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationRolloutType(r flipt.RolloutType) evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType {\n\tswitch r {\n\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n}\n\nvar supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion = semver.MustParse(\"1.38.0\")\n\nfunc (srv *Server) EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) (*evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tnamespaceKey = r.Key\n\t\treference    = r.Reference\n\t\tresp         = &evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot{\n\t\t\tNamespace: &evaluation.EvaluationNamespace{ // TODO: should we get from store?\n\t\t\t\tKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tFlags: make([]*evaluation.EvaluationFlag, 0),\n\t\t}\n\t\tremaining              = true\n\t\tnextPage               string\n\t\tsegments               = make(map[string]*evaluation.EvaluationSegment)\n\t\tsupportedServerVersion = grpc_middleware.FliptAcceptServerVersionFromContext(ctx)\n\t)\n\n\t//  flags/variants in batches\n\tfor remaining {\n\t\tres, err := srv.store.ListFlags(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespaceKey, storage.WithReference(reference)),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(nextPage)),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting flags: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflags := res.Results\n\t\tnextPage = res.NextPageToken\n\t\tremaining = nextPage != \"\"\n\n\t\tfor _, f := range flags {\n\t\t\tflag := &evaluation.EvaluationFlag{\n\t\t\t\tKey:         f.Key,\n\t\t\t\tName:        f.Name,\n\t\t\t\tDescription: f.Description,\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:     f.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\tType:        toEvaluationFlagType(f.Type),\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:   f.CreatedAt,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:   f.UpdatedAt,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tflagKey := storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, f.Key, storage.WithReference(reference))\n\t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\trules, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, flagKey)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rules {\n\t\t\t\t\trule := &evaluation.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tId:              r.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRank:            r.Rank,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.SegmentOperator),\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segments {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif ss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss := &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdistributions, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(r.ID, storage.WithReference(reference)))\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting distributions for rule %q: %w\", r.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// distributions for rule\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdist := &evaluation.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantId:         d.VariantID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        d.VariantKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: d.VariantAttachment,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRollout:           d.Rollout,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Distributions = append(rule.Distributions, dist)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rules = append(flag.Rules, rule)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\trollouts, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, flagKey)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rollout rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rollouts {\n\t\t\t\t\trollout := &evaluation.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType: toEvaluationRolloutType(r.RolloutType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRank: r.Rank,\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch r.RolloutType {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: r.Threshold.Percentage,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      r.Threshold.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment := &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           r.Segment.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.Segment.SegmentOperator),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss = &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegment: segment,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rollouts = append(flag.Rollouts, rollout)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Flags = append(resp.Flags, flag)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
