  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",

  "oldString": "func (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))",
  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",

Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",

_, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {

  "file": {
    "content": "// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\nfunc NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n\treturn &Evaluator{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"variant\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go",
    "numLines": 40,
    "startLine": 30,
    "totalLines": 494
  },

  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go",
  "newString": "\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))",
  "oldString": "\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))",
  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\ntype Evaluator struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  Storer\n}\n\n// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\nfunc NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n\treturn &Evaluator{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"variant\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar lastRank int32\n\n\t// rule loop\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n\n\t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n\t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n\n\t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n\t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n\t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n\t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n\t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n\n\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// no distributions for rule\n\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n\t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n\n\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n\t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t} // end rule loop\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

        "   }",
        " ",

        "+  rules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))",

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluator.go",
  "newString": "// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\nfunc (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))",
  "oldString": "// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\nfunc (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))",
  "originalFile": "package server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\nfunc (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tvar resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\n\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_NOT_FOUND_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:    r.RequestId,\n\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     r.EntityId,\n\t\tContext:      r.Context,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t}\n\n\tif resp != nil {\n\t\tspanAttrs = append(spanAttrs,\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.Value),\n\t\t)\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// BatchEvaluate evaluates a request for multiple flags and entities\nfunc (s *Server) BatchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.batchEvaluate(ctx, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) batchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tres := flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*flipt.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(r.GetRequests())),\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should change this to a native batch query instead of looping through\n\t// each request individually\n\tfor _, req := range r.GetRequests() {\n\t\t// ensure all requests have the same namespace\n\t\tif req.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\t\treq.NamespaceKey = r.NamespaceKey\n\t\t} else if req.NamespaceKey != r.NamespaceKey {\n\t\t\treturn &res, errs.InvalidFieldError(\"namespace_key\", \"must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif r.GetExcludeNotFound() && errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// TODO: we also need to validate each request, we should likely do this in the validation middleware\n\t\tf, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\tRequestId:    req.RequestId,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tEntityId:     req.EntityId,\n\t\t\tContext:      req.Context,\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\ts.logger.Error(\"error evaluating flag\", zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tf.RequestId = \"\"\n\t\tres.Responses = append(res.Responses, f)\n\t}\n\n\treturn &res, nil\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [

      "lines": [

fliptotel.AttributeFlagEnabled.Bool(flag.Enabled))\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get flag\", != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp.TotalCount = int32(total)\n\tresp.NextPageToken = results.NextPageToken\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list flags\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", &resp))\n\treturn   "newString": "// GetSegment gets a segment\nfunc (s *Server) GetSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.GetSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tsegment, err := s.store.GetSegment(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))",

  "originalFile": "package server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n\tempty \"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/emptypb\"\n)\n\n// GetSegment gets a segment\nfunc (s *Server) GetSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.GetSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tsegment, err := s.store.GetSegment(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get segment\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", segment))\n\treturn segment, err\n}\n\n// ListSegments lists all segments\nfunc (s *Server) ListSegments(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.ListSegmentRequest) (*flipt.SegmentList, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list segments\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tns := storage.NewNamespace(r.NamespaceKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference))\n\tresults, err := s.store.ListSegments(ctx, storage.ListWithParameters(ns, r))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp := flipt.SegmentList{\n\t\tSegments: results.Results,\n\t}\n\n\ttotal, err := s.store.CountSegments(ctx, ns)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp.TotalCount = int32(total)\n\tresp.NextPageToken = results.NextPageToken\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list segments\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", &resp))\n\treturn &resp, nil\n}\n\n// CreateSegment creates a segment\nfunc (s *Server) CreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create segment\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", segment))\n\treturn segment, err\n}\n\n// UpdateSegment updates an existing segment\nfunc (s *Server) UpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tsegment, err := s.store.UpdateSegment(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update segment\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", segment))\n\treturn segment, err\n}\n\n// DeleteSegment deletes a segment\nfunc (s *Server) DeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"delete segment\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tif err := s.store.DeleteSegment(ctx, r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n}\n\n// CreateConstraint creates a constraint\nfunc (s *Server) CreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tconstraint, err := s.store.CreateConstraint(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", constraint))\n\treturn constraint, err\n}\n\n// UpdateConstraint updates an existing constraint\nfunc (s *Server) UpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tconstraint, err := s.store.UpdateConstraint(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", constraint))\n\treturn constraint, err\n}\n\n// DeleteConstraint deletes a constraint\nfunc (s *Server) DeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"delete constraint\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tif err := s.store.DeleteConstraint(ctx, r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "package common\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"database/sql\"\n\t\"encoding/base64\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\tsq \"github.com/Masterminds/squirrel\"\n\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tfliptsql \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\nfunc compactJSONString(jsonString string) (string, error) {\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tif err := json.Compact(&buf, []byte(jsonString)); err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\treturn buf.String(), nil\n}\n\nfunc emptyAsNil(str string) *string {\n\tif str == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treturn &str\n}\n\n// GetFlag gets a flag with variants by key\nfunc (s *Store) GetFlag(ctx context.Context, p storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n\n\t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": p.Key}).\n\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\t\tScan(\n\t\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n\t)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tflag.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tflag.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, flag_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": flag.NamespaceKey, \"flag_key\": flag.Key}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn flag, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvariant              flipt.Variant\n\t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tattachment           sql.NullString\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&variant.Id,\n\t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Key,\n\t\t\t&variant.Name,\n\t\t\t&variant.Description,\n\t\t\t&attachment,\n\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t&updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn flag, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvariant.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\t\tvariant.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tif attachment.Valid {\n\t\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(attachment.String)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn flag, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvariant.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag.Variants = append(flag.Variants, &variant)\n\t}\n\n\treturn flag, rows.Err()\n}\n\ntype optionalVariant struct {\n\tId           sql.NullString\n\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n\tKey          sql.NullString\n\tFlagKey      sql.NullString\n\tName         sql.NullString\n\tDescription  sql.NullString\n\tAttachment   sql.NullString\n\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n}\n\n// ListFlags lists all flags with variants\nfunc (s *Store) ListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflags   []*flipt.Flag\n\t\tresults = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{}\n\n\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n\t)\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tquery = query.Limit(req.QueryParams.Limit + 1)\n\t}\n\n\tvar offset uint64\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.PageToken != \"\" {\n\t\ttoken, err := decodePageToken(s.logger, req.QueryParams.PageToken)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\toffset = token.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t} else if req.QueryParams.Offset > 0 {\n\t\toffset = req.QueryParams.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// keep track of flags so we can associated variants in second query.\n\tflagsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Flag)\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n\n\t\t\tfCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tfUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t&fCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&fUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag.CreatedAt = fCreatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tflag.UpdatedAt = fUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\t\tflags = append(flags, flag)\n\t\tflagsByKey[flag.Key] = flag\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.setVariants(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), flagsByKey); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar next *flipt.Flag\n\n\tif len(flags) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tnext = flags[len(flags)-1]\n\t\tflags = flags[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n\t}\n\n\tresults.Results = flags\n\n\tif next != nil {\n\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(flags))})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n\t}\n\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Store) setVariants(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, flagsByKey map[string]*flipt.Flag) error {\n\tallFlagKeys := make([]string, 0, len(flagsByKey))\n\tfor k := range flagsByKey {\n\t\tallFlagKeys = append(allFlagKeys, k)\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": namespaceKey, \"flag_key\": allFlagKeys}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvariant    optionalVariant\n\t\t\tvCreatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t\tvUpdatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&variant.Id,\n\t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Key,\n\t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Name,\n\t\t\t&variant.Description,\n\t\t\t&variant.Attachment,\n\t\t\t&vCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&vUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif flag, ok := flagsByKey[variant.FlagKey.String]; ok {\n\t\t\tflag.Variants = append(flag.Variants, &flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\tId:           variant.Id.String,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: variant.NamespaceKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          variant.Key.String,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variant.FlagKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tName:         variant.Name.String,\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  variant.Description.String,\n\t\t\t\tAttachment:   variant.Attachment.String,\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:    vCreatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    vUpdatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn rows.Close()\n}\n\n// CountFlags counts all flags\nfunc (s *Store) CountFlags(ctx context.Context, p storage.NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error) {\n\tvar count uint64\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"COUNT(*)\").\n\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace()}).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&count); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn count, nil\n}\n\n// CreateFlag creates a flag\nfunc (s *Store) CreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow  = flipt.Now()\n\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tType:         r.Type,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      r.Enabled,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"flags\").\n\t\tColumns(\"namespace_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"\\\"type\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"enabled\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tflag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tflag.Key,\n\t\t\tflag.Type,\n\t\t\tflag.Name,\n\t\t\tflag.Description,\n\t\t\tflag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flag.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flag.UpdatedAt},\n\t\t).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn flag, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateFlag updates an existing flag\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"flags\").\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"enabled\", r.Enabled).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}})\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tp := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key)\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n\t}\n\n\treturn s.GetFlag(ctx, p)\n}\n\n// DeleteFlag deletes a flag\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteFlagRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"flags\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// CreateVariant creates a variant\nfunc (s *Store) CreateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow = flipt.Now()\n\t\tv   = &flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\tId:           uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tAttachment:   r.Attachment,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tattachment := emptyAsNil(r.Attachment)\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"variants\").\n\t\tColumns(\"id\", \"namespace_key\", \"flag_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"attachment\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tv.Id,\n\t\t\tv.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tv.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tv.Key,\n\t\t\tv.Name,\n\t\t\tv.Description,\n\t\t\tattachment,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: v.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: v.UpdatedAt},\n\t\t).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif attachment != nil {\n\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(*attachment)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tv.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t}\n\n\treturn v, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateVariant updates an existing variant\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\twhereClause := sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"flag_key\": r.FlagKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"variants\").\n\t\tSet(\"\\\"key\\\"\", r.Key).\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"attachment\", emptyAsNil(r.Attachment)).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(whereClause)\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"variant %q\", r.Key)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tattachment sql.NullString\n\t\tcreatedAt  fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt  fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tv = &flipt.Variant{}\n\t)\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&v.Id, &v.NamespaceKey, &v.Key, &v.FlagKey, &v.Name, &v.Description, &attachment, &createdAt, &updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tv.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tv.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\tif attachment.Valid {\n\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(attachment.String)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tv.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t}\n\n\treturn v, nil\n}\n\n// DeleteVariant deletes a variant\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"flag_key\": r.FlagKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n",
