  "originalFile": "package common\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"database/sql\"\n\t\"encoding/base64\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\tsq \"github.com/Masterminds/squirrel\"\n\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tfliptsql \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\n// GetSegment gets a segment\nfunc (s *Store) GetSegment(ctx context.Context, req storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tsegment = &flipt.Segment{}\n\n\t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, match_type, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": req.Key}).\n\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\t\tScan(\n\t\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n\t)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"segment %q\", req)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tsegment.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tsegment.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": segment.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": segment.Key}}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn segment, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint           flipt.Constraint\n\t\t\tdescription          sql.NullString\n\t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&constraint.Id,\n\t\t\t&constraint.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Type,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Property,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Operator,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Value,\n\t\t\t&description,\n\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t&updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn segment, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconstraint.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\t\tconstraint.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tconstraint.Description = description.String\n\t\tsegment.Constraints = append(segment.Constraints, &constraint)\n\t}\n\n\treturn segment, rows.Err()\n}\n\ntype optionalConstraint struct {\n\tId           sql.NullString\n\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n\tSegmentKey   sql.NullString\n\tType         sql.NullInt32\n\tProperty     sql.NullString\n\tOperator     sql.NullString\n\tValue        sql.NullString\n\tDescription  sql.NullString\n\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n}\n\n// ListSegments lists all segments\nfunc (s *Store) ListSegments(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tsegments []*flipt.Segment\n\t\tresults  = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment]{}\n\n\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, match_type, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n\t)\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tquery = query.Limit(req.QueryParams.Limit + 1)\n\t}\n\n\tvar offset uint64\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.PageToken != \"\" {\n\t\ttoken, err := decodePageToken(s.logger, req.QueryParams.PageToken)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\toffset = token.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t} else if req.QueryParams.Offset > 0 {\n\t\toffset = req.QueryParams.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// keep track of segments we've seen so we don't append duplicates because of the join\n\tsegmentsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Segment)\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tsegment    = &flipt.Segment{}\n\t\t\tsCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tsUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t&sCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&sUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsegment.CreatedAt = sCreatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tsegment.UpdatedAt = sUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\t\tsegments = append(segments, segment)\n\t\tsegmentsByKey[segment.Key] = segment\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.setConstraints(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), segmentsByKey); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar next *flipt.Segment\n\n\tif len(segments) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tnext = segments[len(segments)-1]\n\t\tsegments = segments[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n\t}\n\n\tresults.Results = segments\n\n\tif next != nil {\n\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(segments))})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n\t}\n\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Store) setConstraints(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, segmentsByKey map[string]*flipt.Segment) error {\n\tallSegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(segmentsByKey))\n\tfor k := range segmentsByKey {\n\t\tallSegmentKeys = append(allSegmentKeys, k)\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": namespaceKey, \"segment_key\": allSegmentKeys}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint optionalConstraint\n\t\t\tcCreatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t\tcUpdatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&constraint.Id,\n\t\t\t&constraint.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Type,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Property,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Operator,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Value,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Description,\n\t\t\t&cCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&cUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif segment, ok := segmentsByKey[constraint.SegmentKey.String]; ok {\n\t\t\tsegment.Constraints = append(segment.Constraints, &flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\tId:           constraint.Id.String,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: constraint.NamespaceKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   constraint.SegmentKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType(constraint.Type.Int32),\n\t\t\t\tProperty:     constraint.Property.String,\n\t\t\t\tOperator:     constraint.Operator.String,\n\t\t\t\tValue:        constraint.Value.String,\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  constraint.Description.String,\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:    cCreatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    cUpdatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn rows.Close()\n}\n\n// CountSegments counts all segments\nfunc (s *Store) CountSegments(ctx context.Context, ns storage.NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error) {\n\tvar count uint64\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"COUNT(*)\").\n\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": ns.Namespace()}).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&count); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn count, nil\n}\n\n// CreateSegment creates a segment\nfunc (s *Store) CreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow     = flipt.Now()\n\t\tsegment = &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tMatchType:    r.MatchType,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"segments\").\n\t\tColumns(\"namespace_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"match_type\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tsegment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tsegment.Key,\n\t\t\tsegment.Name,\n\t\t\tsegment.Description,\n\t\t\tsegment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: segment.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: segment.UpdatedAt}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn segment, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateSegment updates an existing segment\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"segments\").\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"match_type\", r.MatchType).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey, \"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key})\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tp := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key)\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"segment %q\", p)\n\t}\n\n\treturn s.GetSegment(ctx, p)\n}\n\n// DeleteSegment deletes a segment\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"segments\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// CreateConstraint creates a constraint\nfunc (s *Store) CreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\toperator = strings.ToLower(r.Operator)\n\t\tnow      = flipt.Now()\n\t\tc        = &flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\tId:           uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey:   r.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\tType:         r.Type,\n\t\t\tProperty:     r.Property,\n\t\t\tOperator:     operator,\n\t\t\tValue:        r.Value,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\t// unset value if operator does not require it\n\tif _, ok := flipt.NoValueOperators[c.Operator]; ok {\n\t\tc.Value = \"\"\n\t}\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"constraints\").\n\t\tColumns(\"id\", \"namespace_key\", \"segment_key\", \"type\", \"property\", \"operator\", \"value\", \"description\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tc.Id,\n\t\t\tc.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tc.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\tc.Type,\n\t\t\tc.Property,\n\t\t\tc.Operator,\n\t\t\tc.Value,\n\t\t\tc.Description,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: c.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: c.UpdatedAt}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateConstraint updates an existing constraint\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\twhereClause = sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": r.SegmentKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}\n\t\toperator    = strings.ToLower(r.Operator)\n\t)\n\n\t// unset value if operator does not require it\n\tif _, ok := flipt.NoValueOperators[operator]; ok {\n\t\tr.Value = \"\"\n\t}\n\n\tres, err := s.builder.Update(\"constraints\").\n\t\tSet(\"type\", r.Type).\n\t\tSet(\"property\", r.Property).\n\t\tSet(\"operator\", operator).\n\t\tSet(\"value\", r.Value).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"constraint %q\", r.Id)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tc = &flipt.Constraint{}\n\t)\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&c.Id, &c.NamespaceKey, &c.SegmentKey, &c.Type, &c.Property, &c.Operator, &c.Value, &c.Description, &createdAt, &updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tc.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tc.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n\n// DeleteConstraint deletes a constraint\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": r.SegmentKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n",

Input

Output

    "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestVariant_FlagNotFound(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"test-flag\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},",

  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestVariant_FlagNotFound(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"test-flag\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"test-flag not found\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_NonVariantFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_FlagDisabled(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:      false,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.False(t, res.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_EvaluateFailure_OnGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t\tflag         = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(flag, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, errs.ErrInvalid(\"some invalid error\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"some invalid error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t\tflag         = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(flag, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Match)\n\tassert.Contains(t, res.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_FlagNotFoundError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"test-flag\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"test-flag not found\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_NonBooleanFlagError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_DefaultRule_NoRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_DefaultRuleFallthrough_WithPercentageRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 70,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, false, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleFallthrough_SegmentMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         2,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_Constraint_EntityId(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"entity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext:      map[string]string{},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleSegments_WithAnd(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"another-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"another-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\":      \"world\",\n\t\t\t\"pitimes100\": \"314\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_RulesOutOfOrder(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         0,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rollout rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_UnknownFlagType(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tDescription: \"test-flag\",\n\t\tType:        3,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"unknown flag type: 3\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_InternalError_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errors.New(\"internal error\"))\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"internal error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey        = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tanotherFlagKey = \"another-test-flag\"\n\t\tvariantFlagKey = \"variant-test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey   = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore          = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger         = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts              = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"another-test-flag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"variant-test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      anotherFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, res.Responses, 3)\n\n\tb, ok := res.Responses[0].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a boolean evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, b.BooleanResponse.Enabled, \"value should be true from match\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, b.BooleanResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[0].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"1\", b.BooleanResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, b.BooleanResponse.FlagKey)\n\n\te, ok := res.Responses[1].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a error evaluation response\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, anotherFlagKey, e.ErrorResponse.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, namespaceKey, e.ErrorResponse.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, e.ErrorResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[1].Type)\n\n\tv, ok := res.Responses[2].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a variant evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, v.VariantResponse.Match, \"variant response should have matched\")\n\tassert.Contains(t, v.VariantResponse.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, v.VariantResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[2].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"3\", v.VariantResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantFlagKey, v.VariantResponse.FlagKey)\n}\n",

Input
{

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation_test.go",
  "newString": "storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)",
  "oldString": "storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)",
  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestVariant_FlagNotFound(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"test-flag\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"test-flag not found\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_NonVariantFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_FlagDisabled(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:      false,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.False(t, res.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_EvaluateFailure_OnGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t\tflag         = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(flag, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, errs.ErrInvalid(\"some invalid error\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"some invalid error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestVariant_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t\tflag         = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          flagKey,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(flag, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Variant(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Match)\n\tassert.Contains(t, res.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_FlagNotFoundError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"test-flag\"))\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"test-flag not found\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_NonBooleanFlagError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_DefaultRule_NoRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_DefaultRuleFallthrough_WithPercentageRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 70,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, false, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleFallthrough_SegmentMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         2,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_Constraint_EntityId(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey: storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"entity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext:      map[string]string{},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleSegments_WithAnd(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"another-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"another-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\":      \"world\",\n\t\t\t\"pitimes100\": \"314\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_RulesOutOfOrder(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         0,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rollout rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_UnknownFlagType(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tDescription: \"test-flag\",\n\t\tType:        3,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"unknown flag type: 3\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_InternalError_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errors.New(\"internal error\"))\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"internal error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey        = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tanotherFlagKey = \"another-test-flag\"\n\t\tvariantFlagKey = \"variant-test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey   = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore          = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger         = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts              = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"another-test-flag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"variant-test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      anotherFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, res.Responses, 3)\n\n\tb, ok := res.Responses[0].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a boolean evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, b.BooleanResponse.Enabled, \"value should be true from match\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, b.BooleanResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[0].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"1\", b.BooleanResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, b.BooleanResponse.FlagKey)\n\n\te, ok := res.Responses[1].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a error evaluation response\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, anotherFlagKey, e.ErrorResponse.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, namespaceKey, e.ErrorResponse.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, e.ErrorResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[1].Type)\n\n\tv, ok := res.Responses[2].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a variant evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, v.VariantResponse.Match, \"variant response should have matched\")\n\tassert.Contains(t, v.VariantResponse.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, v.VariantResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[2].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"3\", v.VariantResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantFlagKey, v.VariantResponse.FlagKey)\n}\n",
