namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 70,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, false, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_PercentageRuleFallthrough_SegmentMatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         2,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_Constraint_EntityId(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"entity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext:      map[string]string{},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_SegmentMatch_MultipleSegments_WithAnd(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"pitimes100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"314\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"another-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"another-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\":      \"world\",\n\t\t\t\"pitimes100\": \"314\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, res.Enabled)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, res.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, res.FlagKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestBoolean_RulesOutOfOrder(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(\n\t\t&flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 5,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tRank:         0,\n\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"test-segment\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"test-segment\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Boolean(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Nil(t, res)\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rollout rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_UnknownFlagType(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         flagKey,\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\tDescription: \"test-flag\",\n\t\tType:        3,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"unknown flag type: 3\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_InternalError_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey      = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore        = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger       = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts            = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flagKey, namespaceKey)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errors.New(\"internal error\"))\n\n\t_, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"internal error\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatch_Success(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflagKey        = \"test-flag\"\n\t\tanotherFlagKey = \"another-test-flag\"\n\t\tvariantFlagKey = \"variant-test-flag\"\n\t\tnamespaceKey   = \"test-namespace\"\n\t\tstore          = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger         = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts              = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"another-test-flag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: \"test-namespace\",\n\t\tKey:          \"variant-test-flag\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\tType:         flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, flagKey)).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\tRank:         1,\n\t\t\tRolloutType:  flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\tThreshold: &storage.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\tPercentage: 80,\n\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, variantFlagKey)).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"hello\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\tres, err := s.Batch(context.TODO(), &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequests: []*rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      flagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      anotherFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRequestId:    \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variantFlagKey,\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"test-entity\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"hello\": \"world\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, res.Responses, 3)\n\n\tb, ok := res.Responses[0].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a boolean evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, b.BooleanResponse.Enabled, \"value should be true from match\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, b.BooleanResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[0].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"1\", b.BooleanResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flagKey, b.BooleanResponse.FlagKey)\n\n\te, ok := res.Responses[1].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a error evaluation response\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, anotherFlagKey, e.ErrorResponse.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, namespaceKey, e.ErrorResponse.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, e.ErrorResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[1].Type)\n\n\tv, ok := res.Responses[2].Response.(*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok, \"response should be a variant evaluation response\")\n\tassert.True(t, v.VariantResponse.Match, \"variant response should have matched\")\n\tassert.Contains(t, v.VariantResponse.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, v.VariantResponse.Reason)\n\tassert.Equal(t, rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE, res.Responses[2].Type)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"3\", v.VariantResponse.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variantFlagKey, v.VariantResponse.FlagKey)\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": true,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " ",
        "   store.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), namespaceKey, anotherFlagKey)).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFound(\"another-test-flag\"))",

        "     Key:          \"variant-test-flag\",",
        "     Enabled:      true,"

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\tenabledFlag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdisabled := &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"foo\")).Return(enabledFlag, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"bar\")).Return(disabled, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId: \"12345\",\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(resp.Responses))\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Responses[0].Match)\n}\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate_NamespaceMismatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\t_, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey:    \"foo\",\n\t\tRequestId:       \"12345\",\n\t\tExcludeNotFound: true,\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"invalid field namespace_key: must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate_FlagNotFoundExcluded(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdisabled := &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"NotFoundFlag\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", \"NotFoundFlag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:       \"12345\",\n\t\tExcludeNotFound: true,\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\tenabledFlag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdisabled := &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"foo\")).Return(enabledFlag, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"bar\")).Return(disabled, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId: \"12345\",\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(resp.Responses))\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Responses[0].Match)\n}\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate_NamespaceMismatch(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\t_, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey:    \"foo\",\n\t\tRequestId:       \"12345\",\n\t\tExcludeNotFound: true,\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"invalid field namespace_key: must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n}\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate_FlagNotFoundExcluded(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdisabled := &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"foo\")).Return(enabledFlag, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"bar\")).Return(disabled, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"NotFoundFlag\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", \"NotFoundFlag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:       \"12345\",\n\t\tExcludeNotFound: true,\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"NotFoundFlag\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, 2, len(resp.Responses))\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Responses[0].Match)\n}\n\nfunc TestBatchEvaluate_FlagNotFound(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tdisabled := &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"foo\")).Return(enabledFlag, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"bar\")).Return(disabled, nil)\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"default\", \"NotFoundFlag\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", \"NotFoundFlag\"))\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"default\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := s.BatchEvaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:       \"12345\",\n\t\tExcludeNotFound: false,\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: \"NotFoundFlag\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag \\\"NotFoundFlag\\\" not found\")\n}\n",

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestGetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetFlagRequest{Key: \"foo\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     req.Key,\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.GetFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", got.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, got.Enabled)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags_PaginationOffset(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListFlags(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListFlagRequest{\n\t\tOffset: 10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Flags)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(\"Zm9v\"),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListFlags(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListFlagRequest{\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t\tOffset:    10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Flags)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey: \"key\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:     \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Variant{\n\t\tId:          \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:     req.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tId:          \"1\",\n\t\t\tFlagKey:     \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Variant{\n\t\tId:          req.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     req.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore: req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n",

\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestGetRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetRolloutRequest{Id: \"id\", FlagKey: \"flagKey\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetRollout\", mock.Anything, storage.NewNamespace(\"\"), \"id\").Return(&flipt.Rollout{\n\t\tId: \"1\",\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.GetRollout(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRollouts_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(\"Zm9v\"),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListRolloutRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tname string\n\t\treq  *flipt.CreateRolloutRequest\n\t\tresp *flipt.Rollout\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"segment\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:      \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"segments\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{\"segmentKey1\", \"segmentKey2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{\"segmentKey1\", \"segmentKey2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"threshold\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tstore.On(\"CreateRollout\", mock.Anything, test.req).Return(test.resp, nil)\n\n\t\t\tgot, err := s.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), test.req)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, test.resp, got)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tRule: &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateRollout\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rollout{\n\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey: req.FlagKey,\n\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateRollout(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\tId: \"id\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteRollout\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteRollout(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestOrderRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.OrderRolloutsRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RolloutIds: []string{\"1\", \"2\"}}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"OrderRollouts\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.OrderRollouts(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n",

\"flagKey\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rule]{\n\t\t\tResults: \"flagKey\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListRuleRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\tOffset: 10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRules_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer []*flipt.Rule{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListRuleRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t\tOffset: *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\tRank:       1,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateRule\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId:         \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:    req.FlagKey,\n\t\tSegmentKey: req.SegmentKey,\n\t\tRank:       req.Rank,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateRule_MultipleSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:         \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{\"segmentKey1\", \"segmentKey2\"},\n\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\tRank:            1,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateRule\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId:              \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:         req.FlagKey,\n\t\tSegmentKeys:     req.SegmentKeys,\n\t\tSegmentOperator: req.SegmentOperator,\n\t\tRank:            req.Rank,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tId:         \"1\",\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateRule\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId:         \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:    req.FlagKey,\n\t\tSegmentKey: req.SegmentKey,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestOrderRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.OrderRulesRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RuleIds: []string{\"1\", \"2\"}}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"OrderRules\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.OrderRules(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RuleId: \"ruleID\", VariantId: \"variantID\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateDistribution\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Distribution{\n\t\tId:        \"1\",\n\t\tRuleId:    req.RuleId,\n\t\tVariantId: req.VariantId,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq req).Return(&flipt.Distribution{\n\t\tId:        req.Id,\n\t\tRuleId:    req.RuleId,\n\t\tVariantId: req.VariantId,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteDistributionRequest{Id: \"1\", FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RuleId: \"ruleID\", VariantId: \"variantID\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteDistribution\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteDistribution(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n",

TestListSegments_PaginationOffset(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore: []*flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountSegments\", mock.Anything, storage.NewNamespace(\"\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListSegments(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListSegmentRequest{\n\t\tOffset: 10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Segments)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestListSegments_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer []*flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountSegments\", mock.Anything, storage.NewNamespace(\"\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListSegments(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListSegmentRequest{\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t\tOffset:    10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Segments)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateSegment(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateSegment\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Segment{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateSegment(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateSegment\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Segment{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateSegment(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteSegment(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest{\n\t\t\tKey: \"key\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteSegment\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteSegment(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateConstraint(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateConstraintRequest{\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\tType:       flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\tProperty:   \"property\",\n\t\t\tOperator:   flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\tValue:      \"value\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateConstraint\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Constraint{\n\t\tId:         \"1\",\n\t\tSegmentKey: req.SegmentKey,\n\t\tType:       req.Type,\n\t\tProperty:   req.Property,\n\t\tOperator:   req.Operator,\n\t\tValue:      req.Value,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateConstraint(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateConstraint(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest{\n\t\t\tId:          \"1\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateConstraint\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Constraint{\n\t\tId:          req.Id,\n\t\tSegmentKey:  req.SegmentKey,\n\t\tType:        req.Type,\n\t\tProperty:    req.Property,\n\t\tOperator:    req.Operator,\n\t\tValue:       req.Value,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateConstraint(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteConstraint(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest{\n\t\t\tId: \"1\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteConstraint\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteConstraint(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n",
