  "originalFile": "package grpc_middleware\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/cache/memory\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/authn/method/token\"\n\tauthmiddlewaregrpc \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/authn/middleware/grpc\"\n\tservereval \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\tsdktrace \"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n\n\t\"github.com/blang/semver/v4\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\tstorageauth \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/authn\"\n\tauthrpc \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/auth\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc/codes\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc/metadata\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc/status\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/timestamppb\"\n)\n\ntype validatable struct {\n\terr error\n}\n\nfunc (v *validatable) Validate() error {\n\treturn v.err\n}\n\nfunc TestValidationUnaryInterceptor(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\treq        interface{}\n\t\twantCalled int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"does not implement Validate\",\n\t\t\treq:        struct{}{},\n\t\t\twantCalled: 1,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"implements validate no error\",\n\t\t\treq:        &validatable{},\n\t\t\twantCalled: 1,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"implements validate error\",\n\t\t\treq:  &validatable{err: errors.New(\"invalid\")},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq        = tt.req\n\t\t\twantCalled = tt.wantCalled\n\t\t\tcalled     int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tspyHandler = grpc.UnaryHandler(func(ctx context.Context, req interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcalled++\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\t_, _ = ValidationUnaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, nil, spyHandler)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantCalled, called)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestErrorUnaryInterceptor(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname     string\n\t\twantErr  error\n\t\twantCode codes.Code\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"not found error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.ErrNotFound(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.NotFound,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"deadline exceeded error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  fmt.Errorf(\"foo: %w\", context.DeadlineExceeded),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.DeadlineExceeded,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"context cancelled error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  fmt.Errorf(\"foo: %w\", context.Canceled),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.Canceled,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"invalid error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.ErrInvalid(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.InvalidArgument,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"invalid field\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.InvalidFieldError(\"bar\", \"is wrong\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.InvalidArgument,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"empty field\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.EmptyFieldError(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.InvalidArgument,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"unauthenticated error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.NewErrorf[errors.ErrUnauthenticated](\"user %q not found\", \"foo\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.Unauthenticated,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"other error\",\n\t\t\twantErr:  errors.New(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\twantCode: codes.Internal,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no error\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\twantErr  = tt.wantErr\n\t\t\twantCode = tt.wantCode\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tspyHandler = grpc.UnaryHandler(func(ctx context.Context, req interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, wantErr\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\t_, err := ErrorUnaryInterceptor(context.Background(), nil, nil, spyHandler)\n\t\t\tif wantErr != nil {\n\t\t\t\trequire.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tstatus := status.Convert(err)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantCode, status.Code())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluationUnaryInterceptor_Noop(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\thandler = func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\treturn &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t}, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tinfo = &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tgot, err := EvaluationUnaryInterceptor(false)(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tresp, ok := got.(*flipt.Flag)\n\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.Key)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluationUnaryInterceptor_Evaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\ttype request interface {\n\t\tGetRequestId() string\n\t}\n\n\ttype response interface {\n\t\trequest\n\t\tGetTimestamp() *timestamppb.Timestamp\n\t\tGetRequestDurationMillis() float64\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\trequestID string\n\t\treq       request\n\t\tresp      response\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"flipt.EvaluationRequest without request ID\",\n\t\t\trequestID: \"\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"flipt.EvaluationRequest with request ID\",\n\t\t\trequestID: \"bar\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRequestId: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Variant evaluation.EvaluationRequest without request ID\",\n\t\t\trequestID: \"\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &evaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &evaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: &evaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Boolean evaluation.EvaluationRequest with request ID\",\n\t\t\trequestID: \"baz\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRequestId: \"baz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &evaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &evaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: &evaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\thandler = func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\t// ensure request has ID once it reaches the handler\n\t\t\t\t\treq, ok := r.(request)\n\t\t\t\t\trequire.True(t, ok)\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif test.requestID == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, req.GetRequestId())\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn test.resp, nil\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, test.requestID, req.GetRequestId())\n\n\t\t\t\t\treturn test.resp, nil\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tinfo = &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\t\t\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tgot, err := EvaluationUnaryInterceptor(true)(context.Background(), test.req, info, handler)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\t\t\tresp, ok := got.(response)\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\n\t\t\t// check that the requestID is either non-empty\n\t\t\t// or explicitly what was provided for the test\n\t\t\tif test.requestID == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.GetRequestId())\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, test.requestID, resp.GetRequestId())\n\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.NotZero(t, resp.GetTimestamp())\n\t\t\tassert.NotZero(t, resp.GetRequestDurationMillis())\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluationUnaryInterceptor_BatchEvaluation(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\treq = &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\thandler = func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\treturn &flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tResponses: []*flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tinfo = &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tgot, err := EvaluationUnaryInterceptor(false)(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tresp, ok := got.(*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.Responses[0].FlagKey)\n\t// check that the requestID was created and set\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.RequestId)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, resp.RequestDurationMillis)\n\n\treq = &flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId: \"bar\",\n\t\tRequests: []*flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err = EvaluationUnaryInterceptor(false)(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tresp, ok = got.(*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse)\n\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Responses)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.Responses[0].FlagKey)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp.Responses[0].Timestamp)\n\t// check that the requestID was propagated\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.RequestId)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.RequestId)\n\n\t// TODO(yquansah): flakey assertion\n\t// assert.NotZero(t, resp.RequestDurationMillis)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_GetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: flipt.DefaultNamespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.GetFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.GetFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\treq := &flipt.GetFlagRequest{Key: \"foo\"}\n\t\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\t}\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 10, cacheSpy.getCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.getKeys)\n\n\tconst cacheKey = \"f:foo\"\n\t_, ok := cacheSpy.getKeys[cacheKey]\n\tassert.True(t, ok)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.setCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.setItems)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.setItems[cacheKey])\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_UpdateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.UpdateFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.UpdateFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_DeleteFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey: \"key\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.DeleteFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.DeleteFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_CreateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:     \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Variant{\n\t\tId:          \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:     req.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.CreateVariant(ctx, r.(*flipt.CreateVariantRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_UpdateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tId:          \"1\",\n\t\t\tFlagKey:     \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Variant{\n\t\tId:          req.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     req.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.UpdateVariant(ctx, r.(*flipt.UpdateVariantRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_DeleteVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq      = &flipt.DeleteVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tId: \"1\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.DeleteVariant(ctx, r.(*flipt.DeleteVariantRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, cacheSpy.deleteCalled)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.deleteKeys)\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_Evaluate(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = server.New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:                \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:            \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:           100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: `{\"key\":\"value\"}`,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *flipt.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match all\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.Evaluate(ctx, r.(*flipt.EvaluationRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\ti         = i + 1\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\t\t\tresp := got.(*flipt.EvaluationResponse)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, i, cacheSpy.getCalled)\n\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.getKeys)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"boz\", resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value\"}`, resp.Attachment)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_Evaluation_Variant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = servereval.New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:                \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:            \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:           100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: `{\"key\":\"value\"}`,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.Variant(ctx, r.(*evaluation.EvaluationRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\ti         = i + 1\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\t\t\tresp := got.(*evaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, i, cacheSpy.getCalled, \"cache get wasn't called as expected\")\n\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.getKeys, \"cache keys should not be empty\")\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, resp.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"boz\", resp.VariantKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value\"}`, resp.VariantAttachment)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestCacheUnaryInterceptor_Evaluation_Boolean(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcache = memory.NewCache(config.CacheConfig{\n\t\t\tTTL:     time.Second,\n\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\tBackend: config.CacheMemory,\n\t\t})\n\t\tcacheSpy = newCacheSpy(cache)\n\t\tlogger   = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts        = servereval.New(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t\tType:    flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tRolloutType: flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tSegment: &storage.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tValue: true,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tRank: 1,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := CacheUnaryInterceptor(cacheSpy, logger)\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.Boolean(ctx, r.(*evaluation.EvaluationRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"FakeMethod\",\n\t}\n\n\tfor i, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\ti         = i + 1\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(context.Background(), req, info, handler)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\t\t\tresp := got.(*evaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, i, cacheSpy.getCalled, \"cache get wasn't called as expected\")\n\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, cacheSpy.getKeys, \"cache keys should not be empty\")\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Enabled)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, evaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Enabled)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, evaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\ntype checkerDummy struct{}\n\nfunc (c *checkerDummy) Check(e string) bool {\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_CreateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\texporterSpy = newAuditExporterSpy(logger)\n\t\ts           = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq         = &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, &checkerDummy{})\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.CreateFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.CreateFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"CreateFlag\",\n\t}\n\n\ttp := sdktrace.NewTracerProvider(sdktrace.WithSampler(sdktrace.AlwaysSample()))\n\ttp.RegisterSpanProcessor(sdktrace.NewSimpleSpanProcessor(exporterSpy))\n\n\ttr := tp.Tracer(\"SpanProcessor\")\n\tctx, span := tr.Start(context.Background(), \"OnStart\")\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(ctx, req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tspan.End()\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, exporterSpy.GetSendAuditsCalled())\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_UpdateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\texporterSpy = newAuditExporterSpy(logger)\n\t\ts           = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq         = &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, &checkerDummy{})\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, sdktrace.NewTracerProvider(sdktrace.WithSampler(sdktrace.AlwaysSample()))\n\ttp.RegisterSpanProcessor(sdktrace.NewSimpleSpanProcessor(exporterSpy))\n\n\ttr := tp.Tracer(\"SpanProcessor\")\n\tctx, span := tr.Start(context.Background(), \"OnStart\")\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(ctx, req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tspan.End()\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, exporterSpy.GetSendAuditsCalled())\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_DeleteFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = := tr.Start(context.Background(), \"OnStart\")\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(ctx, req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tspan.End()\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, exporterSpy.GetSendAuditsCalled())\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_CreateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\texporterSpy = newAuditExporterSpy(logger)\n\t\ts           = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq         = &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:   \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tRuleId:    \"1\",\n\t\t\tVariantId: \"2\",\n\t\t\tRollout:   25,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateDistribution\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Distribution{\n\t\tId:        \"1\",\n\t\tRuleId:    req.RuleId,\n\t\tVariantId: req.VariantId,\n\t\tRollout:   req.Rollout,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, &checkerDummy{})\n\n\thandler := req).Return(&flipt.Namespace{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, exporterSpy.GetSendAuditsCalled())\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_DeleteNamespace(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = mock.Anything, storage.NewNamespace(req.Key)).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteNamespace\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, &checkerDummy{})\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.DeleteNamespace(ctx, r.(*flipt.DeleteNamespaceRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := := tr.Start(context.Background(), \"OnStart\")\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(ctx, req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tspan.End()\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, exporterSpy.GetSendAuditsCalled())\n}\n\nfunc TestAuthMetadataAuditUnaryInterceptor(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\texporterSpy = newAuditExporterSpy(logger)\n\t\ts           = server.New(logger, store)\n\t\treq         = &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, &checkerDummy{})\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.CreateFlag(ctx, r.(*flipt.CreateFlagRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"CreateFlag\",\n\t}\n\n\ttp := sdktrace.NewTracerProvider(sdktrace.WithSampler(sdktrace.AlwaysSample()))\n\ttp.RegisterSpanProcessor(sdktrace.NewSimpleSpanProcessor(exporterSpy))\n\n\ttr := tp.Tracer(\"SpanProcessor\")\n\tctx, span := tr.Start(context.Background(), \"OnStart\")\n\n\tctx = authmiddlewaregrpc.ContextWithAuthentication(ctx, &authrpc.Authentication{\n\t\tMethod: authrpc.Method_METHOD_OIDC,\n\t\tMetadata: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"io.flipt.auth.oidc.email\": \"example@flipt.com\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(ctx, req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tspan.End()\n\n\tevent := exporterSpy.GetEvents()[0]\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"example@flipt.com\", event.Metadata.Actor.Email)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"oidc\", event.Metadata.Actor.Authentication)\n}\n\nfunc TestAuditUnaryInterceptor_CreateToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &authStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\texporterSpy = newAuditExporterSpy(logger)\n\t\ts           = token.NewServer(logger, store)\n\t\treq         = &authrpc.CreateTokenRequest{\n\t\t\tName: \"token\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateAuthentication\", mock.Anything, &storageauth.CreateAuthenticationRequest{\n\t\tMethod: authrpc.Method_METHOD_TOKEN,\n\t\tMetadata: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"io.flipt.auth.token.name\": \"token\",\n\t\t},\n\t}).Return(\"\", &authrpc.Authentication{Metadata: map[string]string{\n\t\t\"email\": \"example@flipt.io\",\n\t}}, nil)\n\n\tunaryInterceptor := AuditUnaryInterceptor(logger, &checkerDummy{})\n\n\thandler := func(ctx context.Context, r interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\treturn s.CreateToken(ctx, r.(*authrpc.CreateTokenRequest))\n\t}\n\n\tinfo := &grpc.UnaryServerInfo{\n\t\tFullMethod: \"CreateToken\",\n\t}\n\n\ttp := sdktrace.NewTracerProvider(sdktrace.WithSampler(sdktrace.AlwaysSample()))\n\ttp.RegisterSpanProcessor(sdktrace.NewSimpleSpanProcessor(exporterSpy))\n\n\ttr := tp.Tracer(\"SpanProcessor\")\n\tctx, span := tr.Start(context.Background(), \"OnStart\")\n\n\tgot, err := unaryInterceptor(ctx, req, info, handler)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tspan.End()\n\tassert.Equal(t, 1, exporterSpy.GetSendAuditsCalled())\n}\n\nfunc TestFliptAcceptServerVersionUnaryInterceptor(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname          string\n\t\tmetadata      metadata.MD\n\t\texpectVersion string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"does not contain x-flipt-accept-server-version header\",\n\t\t\tmetadata: metadata.MD{},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"contains valid x-flipt-accept-server-version header with v prefix\",\n\t\t\tmetadata: metadata.MD{\n\t\t\t\t\"x-flipt-accept-server-version\": []string{\"v1.0.0\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectVersion: \"1.0.0\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"contains valid x-flipt-accept-server-version header no prefix\",\n\t\t\tmetadata: metadata.MD{\n\t\t\t\t\"x-flipt-accept-server-version\": []string{\"1.0.0\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectVersion: \"1.0.0\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"contains invalid x-flipt-accept-server-version header\",\n\t\t\tmetadata: metadata.MD{\n\t\t\t\t\"x-flipt-accept-server-version\": []string{\"invalid\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\ttt := tt\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tctx          = context.Background()\n\t\t\t\tretrievedCtx = ctx\n\t\t\t\tcalled       int\n\n\t\t\t\tspyHandler = grpc.UnaryHandler(func(ctx context.Context, req interface{}) (interface{}, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcalled++\n\t\t\t\t\tretrievedCtx = ctx\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\t\t\tinterceptor = FliptAcceptServerVersionUnaryInterceptor(logger)\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tif tt.metadata != nil {\n\t\t\t\tctx = metadata.NewIncomingContext(context.Background(), tt.metadata)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, _ = interceptor(ctx, nil, nil, spyHandler)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, 1, called)\n\n\t\t\tv := FliptAcceptServerVersionFromContext(retrievedCtx)\n\t\t\trequire.NotNil(t, v)\n\n\t\t\tif tt.expectVersion != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, semver.MustParse(tt.expectVersion), v)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, preFliptAcceptServerVersion, v)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "package cache\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestSetHandleMarshalError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcacher      = &cacheSpy{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\tcachedStore.set(context.TODO(), \"key\", make(chan int))\n\tassert.Empty(t, cacher.cacheKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetHandleGetError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore       = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcacher      = &cacheSpy{getErr: errors.New(\"get error\")}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\tvalue := make(map[string]string)\n\tcacheHit := cachedStore.get(context.TODO(), \"key\", &value)\n\tassert.False(t, cacheHit)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetHandleUnmarshalError(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tcacher = &cacheSpy{\n\t\t\tcached:      true,\n\t\t\tcachedValue: []byte(`{\"invalid\":\"123\"`),\n\t\t}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\tvalue := make(map[string]string)\n\tcacheHit := cachedStore.get(context.TODO(), \"key\", &value)\n\tassert.False(t, cacheHit)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\texpectedRules = []*storage.EvaluationRule{{ID: \"123\"}}\n\t\tstore         = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\")).Return(\n\t\texpectedRules, nil,\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcacher      = &cacheSpy{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\trules, err := cachedStore.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, expectedRules, rules)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"s:er:ns:flag-1\", cacher.cacheKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, []byte(`[{\"id\":\"123\"}]`), cacher.cachedValue)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRulesCached(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\texpectedRules = []*storage.EvaluationRule{{Rank: 12}}\n\t\tstore         = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRules\", context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcacher = &cacheSpy{\n\t\t\tcached:      true,\n\t\t\tcachedValue: []byte(`[{\"rank\":12}]`),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\trules, err := cachedStore.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, expectedRules, rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"s:er:ns:flag-1\", cacher.cacheKey)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\texpectedRollouts = []*storage.EvaluationRollout{{Rank: 1}}\n\t\tstore            = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\")).Return(\n\t\texpectedRollouts, nil,\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcacher      = &cacheSpy{}\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\trollouts, err := cachedStore.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, expectedRollouts, rollouts)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"s:ero:ns:flag-1\", cacher.cacheKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, []byte(`[{\"rank\":1}]`), cacher.cachedValue)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRolloutsCached(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\texpectedRollouts = []*storage.EvaluationRollout{{Rank: 1}}\n\t\tstore            = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.AssertNotCalled(t, \"GetEvaluationRollouts\", context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcacher = &cacheSpy{\n\t\t\tcached:      true,\n\t\t\tcachedValue: []byte(`[{\"rank\":1}]`),\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlogger      = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\tcachedStore = NewStore(store, cacher, logger)\n\t)\n\n\trollouts, err := cachedStore.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"ns\", \"flag-1\"))\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, expectedRollouts, rollouts)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"s:ero:ns:flag-1\", cacher.cacheKey)\n}\n",

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/storage/fs/git/store_test.go",
  "newString": "storage.NewResource(ctx, \"production\", \"foo\")",
  "oldString": "storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\")",
  "originalFile": "package git\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/pem\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-billy/v5/memfs\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/object\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport/http\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/storage/memory\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/fs\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nvar gitRepoURL = os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_URL\")\n\nfunc Test_Store_String(t *testing.T) {\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"git\", (&SnapshotStore{}).String())\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_Subscribe_Hash(t *testing.T) {\n\thead := os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD\")\n\tif head == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// this helper will fail if there is a problem with this option\n\t// the only difference in behaviour is that the poll loop\n\t// will silently (intentionally) not run\n\ttestStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithRef(head))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n    - key: foo\n      name: Foo`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithRevision(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/new-branch\",\n\t\tCreate: true,\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n  - key: foo\n    name: Foo\n  - key: bar\n    name: Bar`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t\tRefSpecs:   []config.RefSpec{\"refs/heads/new-branch:refs/heads/new-branch\"},\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in default revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"main\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in explicitly named main revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"new-branch\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"flag should be present on new-branch\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithDirectory(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t),\n\t\t// scope flag state discovery to sub-directory\n\t\tWithDirectory(\"subdir\"),\n\t)\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"alternative\", \"otherflag\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedSkipTLS(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr := testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(false))\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(true))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedCABytes(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tpemCert := &pem.Block{\n\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n\t\tBytes: ts.Certificate().Raw,\n\t}\n\terr := pem.Encode(&buf, pemCert)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL)\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithCABundle(buf.Bytes()))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc testStore(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) (*SnapshotStore, bool) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tif gitRepoURL == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_URL env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn nil, true\n\t}\n\n\tt.Log(\"Git repo host:\", gitRepoURL)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn source, false\n}\n\nfunc testStoreWithError(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) error {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": true,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

        " ",

        "+    _, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, \"production\", \"foo\"))",

  ],

}

  "oldString": "storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\")",
  "originalFile": "package git\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/pem\"\n\t\"net/http/httptest\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-billy/v5/memfs\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/object\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/plumbing/transport/http\"\n\t\"github.com/go-git/go-git/v5/storage/memory\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/fs\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nvar gitRepoURL = os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_URL\")\n\nfunc Test_Store_String(t *testing.T) {\n\trequire.Equal(t, \"git\", (&SnapshotStore{}).String())\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_Subscribe_Hash(t *testing.T) {\n\thead := os.Getenv(\"TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD\")\n\tif head == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_HEAD env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// this helper will fail if there is a problem with this option\n\t// the only difference in behaviour is that the poll loop\n\t// will silently (intentionally) not run\n\ttestStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithRef(head))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n    - key: foo\n      name: Foo`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, \"production\", \"foo\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithRevision(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t))\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/new-branch\",\n\t\tCreate: true,\n\t}))\n\n\t// update features.yml\n\tfi, err := workdir.OpenFile(\"features.yml\", os.O_TRUNC|os.O_RDWR, os.ModePerm)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tupdated := []byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n  - key: foo\n    name: Foo\n  - key: bar\n    name: Bar`)\n\n\t_, err = fi.Write(updated)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\trequire.NoError(t, fi.Close())\n\n\t// commit changes\n\t_, err = tree.Commit(\"chore: update features.yml\", &git.CommitOptions{\n\t\tAll:    true,\n\t\tAuthor: &object.Signature{Email: \"dev@flipt.io\", Name: \"dev\"},\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// push new commit\n\trequire.NoError(t, repo.Push(&git.PushOptions{\n\t\tAuth:       &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tRemoteName: \"origin\",\n\t\tRefSpecs:   []config.RefSpec{\"refs/heads/new-branch:refs/heads/new-branch\"},\n\t}))\n\n\t// wait until the snapshot is updated or\n\t// we timeout\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-ch:\n\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for snapshot\")\n\t}\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in default revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"main\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in explicitly named main revision\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"new-branch\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err, \"flag should be present on new-branch\")\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_View_WithDirectory(t *testing.T) {\n\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\tstore, skip := testStore(t, gitRepoURL, WithPollOptions(\n\t\tfs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\tfs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}),\n\t),\n\t\t// scope flag state discovery to sub-directory\n\t\tWithDirectory(\"subdir\"),\n\t)\n\tif skip {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\t// pull repo\n\tworkdir := memfs.New()\n\trepo, err := git.Clone(memory.NewStorage(), workdir, &git.CloneOptions{\n\t\tAuth:          &http.BasicAuth{Username: \"root\", Password: \"password\"},\n\t\tURL:           gitRepoURL,\n\t\tRemoteName:    \"origin\",\n\t\tReferenceName: plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(\"main\"),\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\ttree, err := repo.Worktree()\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, tree.Checkout(&git.CheckoutOptions{\n\t\tBranch: \"refs/heads/main\",\n\t}))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"alternative\", \"otherflag\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedSkipTLS(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr := testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(false))\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(true))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedCABytes(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tpemCert := &pem.Block{\n\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n\t\tBytes: ts.Certificate().Raw,\n\t}\n\terr := pem.Encode(&buf, pemCert)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL)\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithCABundle(buf.Bytes()))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc testStore(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) (*SnapshotStore, bool) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tif gitRepoURL == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_URL env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn nil, true\n\t}\n\n\tt.Log(\"Git repo host:\", gitRepoURL)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn source, false\n}\n\nfunc testStoreWithError(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) error {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": true,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

        " ",
        "   require.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {",

        "     require.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in default revision\")",

        "+    _, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, \"production\", \"bar\"))",
        "     require.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be found in explicitly named main revision\")",
        "     return nil",

        "-    _, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"bar\"))",
        "+    _, err := s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, \"production\", \"bar\"))",
        "     require.NoError(t, err, \"flag should be present on new-branch\")",

err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"alternative\", \"otherflag\"))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}))\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedSkipTLS(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr := testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(false))\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithInsecureTLS(true))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc Test_Store_SelfSignedCABytes(t *testing.T) {\n\tts := httptest.NewTLSServer(nil)\n\tdefer ts.Close()\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tpemCert := &pem.Block{\n\t\tType:  \"CERTIFICATE\",\n\t\tBytes: ts.Certificate().Raw,\n\t}\n\terr := pem.Encode(&buf, pemCert)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// This is not a valid Git source, but it still proves the point that a\n\t// well-known server with a self-signed certificate will be accepted by Flipt\n\t// when configuring the TLS options for the source\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL)\n\trequire.ErrorContains(t, err, \"tls: failed to verify certificate: x509: certificate signed by unknown authority\")\n\terr = testStoreWithError(t, ts.URL, WithCABundle(buf.Bytes()))\n\t// This time, we don't expect a tls validation error anymore\n\trequire.ErrorIs(t, err, transport.ErrRepositoryNotFound)\n}\n\nfunc testStore(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) (*SnapshotStore, bool) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tif gitRepoURL == \"\" {\n\t\tt.Skip(\"Set non-empty TEST_GIT_REPO_URL env var to run this test.\")\n\t\treturn nil, true\n\t}\n\n\tt.Log(\"Git repo host:\", gitRepoURL)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn source, false\n}\n\nfunc testStoreWithError(t *testing.T, gitRepoURL string, opts ...containers.Option[SnapshotStore]) error {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\tt.Cleanup(cancel)\n\n\tsource, err := NewSnapshotStore(ctx, zaptest.NewLogger(t), gitRepoURL,\n\t\tappend([]containers.Option[SnapshotStore]{\n\t\t\tWithRef(\"main\"),\n\t\t\tWithAuth(&http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\tUsername: \"root\",\n\t\t\t\tPassword: \"password\",\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t},\n\t\t\topts...)...,\n\t)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t_ = source.Close()\n\t})\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": true,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   }))",
        " ",
        "   require.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, \"\", func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {",

}

  "oldString": "storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\")",
  "originalFile": "package object\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"embed\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io/fs\"\n\t\"net/url\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tgstorage \"cloud.google.com/go/storage\"\n\t\"github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go/sdk/storage/azblob\"\n\t\"github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/config\"\n\t\"github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2/service/s3\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tstoragefs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/fs\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n\tgcblob \"gocloud.dev/blob\"\n\t\"gocloud.dev/blob/azureblob\"\n\t\"gocloud.dev/blob/fileblob\"\n\t\"gocloud.dev/blob/gcsblob\"\n\t\"gocloud.dev/blob/memblob\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\tbucketName = \"testdata\"\n\t//go:embed all:testdata/*\n\ttestdata embed.FS\n)\n\nfunc Test_Store(t *testing.T) {\n\tt.Run(memblob.Scheme, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\ttestStore(t, func(t *testing.T) string {\n\t\t\tt.Helper()\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s://%s\", memblob.Scheme, bucketName)\n\t\t})\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(fileblob.Scheme, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\ttestStore(t, func(t *testing.T) string {\n\t\t\tt.Helper()\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s://%s\", fileblob.Scheme, t.TempDir())\n\t\t})\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"s3\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tminioURL := os.Getenv(\"TEST_S3_ENDPOINT\")\n\t\tif minioURL == \"\" {\n\t\t\tt.Skip(\"set TEST_S3_ENDPOINT to run this case\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tctx := context.Background()\n\t\tclient := s3Client(t, minioURL)\n\t\t_, err := client.CreateBucket(ctx, &s3.CreateBucketInput{\n\t\t\tBucket: &bucketName,\n\t\t})\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t\t_, _ = client.DeleteBucket(ctx, &s3.DeleteBucketInput{\n\t\t\t\tBucket: &bucketName,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t})\n\n\t\ttestStore(t, func(t *testing.T) string {\n\t\t\tt.Helper()\n\t\t\tq := url.Values{}\n\t\t\tq.Set(\"awssdk\", \"v2\")\n\t\t\tq.Set(\"region\", \"minio\")\n\t\t\tq.Set(\"endpoint\", minioURL)\n\t\t\ts3 := &url.URL{\n\t\t\t\tScheme:   \"s3\",\n\t\t\t\tHost:     bucketName,\n\t\t\t\tRawQuery: q.Encode(),\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn s3.String()\n\t\t})\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"azure\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tazuriteURL := os.Getenv(\"TEST_AZURE_ENDPOINT\")\n\t\tif azuriteURL == \"\" {\n\t\t\tt.Skip(\"set TEST_AZURE_ENDPOINT to run this case\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tu, err := url.Parse(azuriteURL)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tos.Setenv(\"AZURE_STORAGE_PROTOCOL\", u.Scheme)\n\t\tos.Setenv(\"AZURE_STORAGE_IS_LOCAL_EMULATOR\", strconv.FormatBool(u.Scheme == \"http\"))\n\t\tos.Setenv(\"AZURE_STORAGE_DOMAIN\", u.Host)\n\n\t\tctx := context.Background()\n\t\tclient := azureClient(t, azuriteURL)\n\t\t_, err = client.CreateContainer(ctx, bucketName, &azblob.CreateContainerOptions{})\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t\t_, _ = client.DeleteContainer(ctx, bucketName, &azblob.DeleteContainerOptions{})\n\t\t})\n\n\t\ttestStore(t, func(t *testing.T) string {\n\t\t\tt.Helper()\n\n\t\t\ts3 := &url.URL{\n\t\t\t\tScheme: azureblob.Scheme,\n\t\t\t\tHost:   bucketName,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn s3.String()\n\t\t})\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"gcs\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\temulatorURL := os.Getenv(\"STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST\")\n\t\tif emulatorURL == \"\" {\n\t\t\tt.Skip(\"set STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST to run this case\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tctx := context.Background()\n\n\t\tclient := gcsClient(t)\n\t\tbucket := client.Bucket(bucketName)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, bucket.Create(ctx, \"\", nil))\n\n\t\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t\t_ = bucket.Delete(ctx)\n\t\t})\n\n\t\ttestStore(t, func(t *testing.T) string {\n\t\t\tt.Helper()\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s://%s\", gcsblob.Scheme, bucketName)\n\t\t})\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc testStore(t *testing.T, fn func(t *testing.T) string) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tctx := context.TODO()\n\n\tt.Run(\"WithoutPrefix\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tch := make(chan struct{})\n\n\t\tdest := fn(t)\n\n\t\tt.Log(\"opening bucket\", dest)\n\t\tu, err := url.Parse(dest)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tbucket, err := OpenBucket(ctx, u)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tt.Cleanup(func() { _ = bucket.Close() })\n\n\t\twriteTestDataToBucket(t, ctx, bucket)\n\n\t\tt.Log(\"Creating store to test\")\n\n\t\tstore, err := NewSnapshotStore(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tzaptest.NewLogger(t),\n\t\t\tu.Scheme,\n\t\t\tbucket,\n\t\t\tWithPollOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstoragefs.WithInterval(time.Second),\n\t\t\t\tstoragefs.WithNotify(t, func(modified bool) {\n\t\t\t\t\tif modified {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tclose(ch)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t\t_ = store.Close()\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// both the production and prefix namespaces should be present\n\t\t// however, both should be empty\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t\t_, err := s.GetNamespace(ctx, storage.NewNamespace(\"production\"))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t_, err = s.GetNamespace(ctx, storage.NewNamespace(\"prefix\"))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\"))\n\t\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be defined yet\")\n\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}))\n\n\t\t// update features.yml\n\t\tpath := \"features.yml\"\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, bucket.WriteAll(context.TODO(), path,\n\t\t\t[]byte(`namespace: production\nflags:\n    - key: foo\n      name: Foo`),\n\t\t\t&gcblob.WriterOptions{}))\n\n\t\t// assert matching state\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ch:\n\t\tcase <-time.After(time.Minute):\n\t\t\tt.Fatal(\"timed out waiting for update\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tt.Log(\"received new snapshot\")\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t\t_, err = s.GetNamespace(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"production\"))\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\"))\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err = s.GetNamespace(context.TODO(), storage.NewNamespace(\"prefix\"))\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}))\n\t})\n\n\tt.Run(\"WithPrefix\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tdest := fn(t)\n\n\t\tt.Log(\"opening bucket\", dest)\n\t\tu, err := url.Parse(dest)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tbucket, err := OpenBucket(ctx, u)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tt.Cleanup(func() { _ = bucket.Close() })\n\n\t\twriteTestDataToBucket(t, ctx, bucket)\n\n\t\tt.Log(\"Creating store to test\")\n\n\t\tstore, err := NewSnapshotStore(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tzaptest.NewLogger(t),\n\t\t\tu.Scheme,\n\t\t\tbucket,\n\t\t\tWithPrefix(\"prefix\"),\n\t\t)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tt.Cleanup(func() {\n\t\t\t_ = store.Close()\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// both the production and prefix namespaces should be present\n\t\t// however, both should be empty\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, store.View(ctx, func(s storage.ReadOnlyStore) error {\n\t\t\t_, err := s.GetNamespace(ctx, storage.NewNamespace(\"production\"))\n\t\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"should not exist in prefixed bucket\")\n\n\t\t\t_, err = s.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(\"production\", \"foo\"))\n\t\t\trequire.Error(t, err, \"flag should not be defined yet\")\n\n\t\t\t_, err = s.GetNamespace(ctx, storage.NewNamespace(\"prefix\"))\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}))\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc writeTestDataToBucket(t *testing.T, ctx context.Context, bucket *gcblob.Bucket) {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tt.Log(\"Adding testdata contents to target bucket\")\n\n\tsrc, err := fs.Sub(testdata, \"testdata\")\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// copy testdata into target bucket\n\terr = fs.WalkDir(src, \".\", func(path string, d fs.DirEntry, err error) error {\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif d.IsDir() {\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tt.Log(\"Adding key to bucket\", path)\n\n\t\tbytes, err := fs.ReadFile(src, path)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\terr = bucket.WriteAll(ctx, path, bytes, &gcblob.WriterOptions{})\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\treturn nil\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc s3Client(t *testing.T, endpoint string) *s3.Client {\n\tt.Helper()\n\n\tcfg, err := config.LoadDefaultConfig(context.Background(),\n\t\tconfig.WithRegion(\"minio\"))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar s3Opts []func(*s3.Options)\n\tif endpoint != \"\" {\n\t\ts3Opts = append(s3Opts, func(o *s3.Options) {\n\t\t\to.BaseEndpoint = &endpoint\n\t\t\to.UsePathStyle = true\n\t\t\to.Region = \"minio\"\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\treturn s3.NewFromConfig(cfg, s3Opts...)\n}\n\nfunc azureClient(t *testing.T, endpoint string) *azblob.Client {\n\tt.Helper()\n\taccount := os.Getenv(\"AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT\")\n\tsharedKey := os.Getenv(\"AZURE_STORAGE_KEY\")\n\tcredentials, err := azblob.NewSharedKeyCredential(account, sharedKey)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tclient, err := azblob.NewClientWithSharedKeyCredential(endpoint, credentials, nil)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn client\n}\n\nfunc gcsClient(t *testing.T) *gstorage.Client {\n\tt.Helper()\n\tclient, err := gstorage.NewClient(context.Background())\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\treturn client\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": true,
