  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\tferrors \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc Test_matchesString(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tconstraint storage.EvaluationConstraint\n\t\tvalue      string\n\t\twantMatch  bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"eq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"bar\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative eq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"baz\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"neq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"baz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative neq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"empty\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"empty\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \" \",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative empty\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"empty\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not empty\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notempty\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"bar\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative not empty\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notempty\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"unknown operator\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"prefix\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"prefix\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"ba\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"bar\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative prefix\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"prefix\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"nope\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"suffix\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"suffix\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"ar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"bar\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative suffix\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"suffix\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"nope\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[\\\"bar\\\", \\\"baz\\\"]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"baz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[\\\"bar\\\", \\\"baz\\\"]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"nope\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is one of (invalid json)\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[\\\"bar\\\", \\\"baz\\\"\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is one of (non-string values)\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[\\\"bar\\\", 5]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is not one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isnotoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[\\\"bar\\\", \\\"baz\\\"]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"baz\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is not one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isnotoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[\\\"bar\\\", \\\"baz\\\"]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"nope\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint = tt.constraint\n\t\t\tvalue      = tt.value\n\t\t\twantMatch  = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmatch := matchesString(constraint, value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantMatch, match)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Test_matchesNumber(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tconstraint storage.EvaluationConstraint\n\t\tvalue      string\n\t\twantMatch  bool\n\t\twantErr    bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"1\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative notpresent\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"NAN constraint value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"5\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"NAN context value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"5\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"eq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"42.0\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"42.0\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative eq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"42.0\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"50\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"neq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"42.0\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"50\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative neq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"42.0\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"42.0\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"lt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"42.0\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"8\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative lt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"42.0\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"50\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"lte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"42.0\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"42.0\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative lte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"42.0\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"102.0\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"gt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"10.11\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"10.12\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative gt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"10.11\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"1\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"gte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"10.11\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"10.11\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative gte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"10.11\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"0.11\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"empty value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"0.11\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"unknown operator\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"0.11\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"0.11\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative suffix empty value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"suffix\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[3, 3.14159, 4]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"3.14159\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, 3.14159, 4]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"9\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is one of (non-number values)\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, \\\"str\\\"]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"5\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is not one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isnotoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, 3.14159, 4]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"3\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is not one of\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isnotoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, 3.14159, 4]\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"3.14159\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: false,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is not one of (invalid json)\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"isnotoneof\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"[5, 6\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"5\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint = tt.constraint\n\t\t\tvalue      = tt.value\n\t\t\twantMatch  = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t\twantErr    = tt.wantErr\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmatch, err := matchesNumber(constraint, value)\n\n\t\t\tif wantErr {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tvar ierr ferrors.ErrInvalid\n\t\t\t\tassert.ErrorAs(t, err, &ierr)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantMatch, match)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Test_matchesBool(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tconstraint storage.EvaluationConstraint\n\t\tvalue      string\n\t\twantMatch  bool\n\t\twantErr    bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"true\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative notpresent\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not a bool\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"true\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is true\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"true\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"true\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is true\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"true\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"false\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"is false\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"false\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"false\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative is false\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"false\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"empty value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"false\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"unknown operator\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint = tt.constraint\n\t\t\tvalue      = tt.value\n\t\t\twantMatch  = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t\twantErr    = tt.wantErr\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmatch, err := matchesBool(constraint, value)\n\n\t\t\tif wantErr {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tvar ierr ferrors.ErrInvalid\n\t\t\t\tassert.ErrorAs(t, err, &ierr)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantMatch, match)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc Test_matchesDateTime(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname       string\n\t\tconstraint storage.EvaluationConstraint\n\t\tvalue      string\n\t\twantMatch  bool\n\t\twantErr    bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"present\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not present\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative notpresent\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"notpresent\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not a datetime constraint value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"not a datetime context value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:   \"foo\",\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"eq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"eq date only\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative eq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"neq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative neq\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative neq date only\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"neq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"lt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2005-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative lt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2005-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"lte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative lte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"lte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"gt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative gt\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gt\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2007-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"gte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue:     \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"negative gte\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"gte\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2005-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"empty value\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"unknown operator\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\tProperty: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tOperator: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:    \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tvalue: \"2006-01-02T15:04:05Z\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint = tt.constraint\n\t\t\tvalue      = tt.value\n\t\t\twantMatch  = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t\twantErr    = tt.wantErr\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tmatch, err := matchesDateTime(constraint, value)\n\n\t\t\tif wantErr {\n\t\t\t\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tvar ierr ferrors.ErrInvalid\n\t\t\t\tassert.ErrorAs(t, err, &ierr)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, wantMatch, match)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nvar (\n\tenabledFlag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}\n\tdisabledFlag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: false,\n\t}\n)\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_FlagDisabled(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), disabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_NonVariantFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), &flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\tType:    flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE,\n\t}, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag type BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE invalid\")\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_FlagNoRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_ErrorGettingRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, errors.New(\"error getting rules!\"))\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_RulesOutOfOrder(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"rule rank: 0 detected out of order\")\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_ErrorParsingNumber(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\nfunc TestEvaluator_ErrorParsingDateTime(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_ErrorGettingDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, errors.New(\"error getting distributions!\"))\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.Error(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\n// Match ALL constraints\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_NoVariants_NoDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_MultipleSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:              \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:            0,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"company\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"flipt\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":     \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"company\": \"flipt\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey, \"segment key should be empty\")\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\n\t\t\tassert.Len(t, resp.SegmentKeys, 2)\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, resp.SegmentKeys, \"bar\")\n\t\t\tassert.Contains(t, resp.SegmentKeys, \"foo\")\n\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_DistributionNotMatched(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:                \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:            \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:           10,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: `{\"key\":\"value\"}`,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tEntityId: \"123\",\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\n\tassert.False(t, resp.Match, \"distribution not matched\")\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_SingleVariantDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:                \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:            \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:           100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: `{\"key\":\"value\"}`,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"boz\", resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value\"}`, resp.Attachment)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_RolloutDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_RolloutDistribution_MultiRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"subscribers\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"subscribers\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: premium_user (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"premium_user\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"all_users\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"all_users\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"released\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"unreleased\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tEntityId: uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"premium_user\": \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"subscribers\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAll_NoConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match no value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"10\",\n\t\t\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match no value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// Match ANY constraints\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_NoVariants_NoDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_SingleVariantDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: admin (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"3\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"admin\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\treq       *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\twantMatch bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches all\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches one\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\":   \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches just bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"matches just string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantMatch: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no matches wrong bool value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"admin\": \"false\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no matches wrong string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match none\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"boss\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\": \"true\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq       = tt.req\n\t\t\twantMatch = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"boz\", resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_RolloutDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"no match string value\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_RolloutDistribution_MultiRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"subscribers\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"subscribers\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: premium_user (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"premium_user\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"all_users\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"all_users\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: premium_user (bool) == true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"premium_user\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpTrue,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"released\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"unreleased\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tEntityId: uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\"premium_user\": \"true\",\n\t\t},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"subscribers\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchEntityId(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"subscribers\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"subscribers\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"entity\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"released\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"unreleased\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\tEntityId: \"user@flipt.io\",\n\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t})\n\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"subscribers\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, resp.Value)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n}\n\nfunc TestEvaluator_MatchAny_NoConstraints(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match no value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"10\",\n\t\t\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match no value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext:  map[string]string{},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 2\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"01\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"boz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"moz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// Since we skip rollout buckets that have 0% distribution, ensure that things still work\n// when a 0% distribution is the first available one.\nfunc TestEvaluator_FirstRolloutRuleIsZero(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"boz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"7\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    100,\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"booz\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", resp.FlagKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, req.Context, resp.RequestContext)\n\n\t\t\tif !wantMatch {\n\t\t\t\tassert.False(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\t\tassert.Empty(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// Ensure things work properly when many rollout distributions have a 0% value.\nfunc TestEvaluator_MultipleZeroRolloutDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &evaluationStoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = NewEvaluator(logger, store)\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    0,\n\t\t\t\tSegments: map[string]*storage.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType:  flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConstraints: []storage.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// constraint: bar (string) == baz\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tID:       \"2\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: flipt.OpEQ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, storage.NewID(\"1\")).Return(\n\t\t[]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"2\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"3\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"4\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"5\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    0,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tID:         \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRuleID:     \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantID:  \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tVariantKey: \"6\",\n\t\t\t\tRollout:    50,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname              string\n\t\treq               *evaluation.EvaluationRequest\n\t\tmatchesVariantKey string\n\t\twantMatch         bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"match string value - variant 1\",\n\t\t\treq: &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:  \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\tEntityId: \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tContext: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": \"baz\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey: \"3\",\n\t\t\twantMatch:         true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\treq               = tt.req\n\t\t\tmatchesVariantKey = tt.matchesVariantKey\n\t\t\twantMatch         = tt.wantMatch\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tresp, err := s.Evaluate(context.TODO(), enabledFlag, req)\n\t\t\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tassert.True(t, resp.Match)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", resp.SegmentKey)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, matchesVariantKey, resp.Value)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON, resp.Reason)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

170. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "go build -v ./internal/storage/storage.go 2>&1 | grep -i \"error\\|warning\" | head -10",
  "description": "Check compilation of storage.go"
}

{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,

  "stdout": ""

        Code Changes (61)
        
1. EDIT /workspace/internal/storage/storage.go
Before
// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.
// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.
func NewResource(ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {
	p := ResourceRequest{
		NamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{
			key: ns,
		},
		Key: key,
	}

	containers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)

	return p
}
After
// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.
// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.
func NewResource(ctx context.Context, ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {
	p := ResourceRequest{
		NamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{
			key: ns,
		},
		Key: key,
	}

	containers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)

	return p
}
